listing_name: Modern Apartment in Central Hanoi
description:
This lovely apartment is located in the heart of Hanoi with large, airy bedrooms, a private kitchen and laundry facilities. Enjoy the uniquely Vietnamese atmosphere of the neighbourhood right outside the door with an endless mix of restaurants, cafes and shops and a 5-minute walk to Hoan Kiem Lake.

The space
This beautifully decorated modern 1 bedroom apartment is located in the very centre of Hanoi in Ly Quoc Su Street.

It is within easy walking distance to Hoan Kiem Lake, The famous St Joseph's Cathedral as well as many restaurants and shops.

The apartment is in a quiet spot but when you walk out of the door you are in the heart of Hanoi life. The apartment has wifi, cable TV, a modern, fully equipped kitchen, and share washing machine and drier.

The bedroom and living area both have a balcony and windows that let in lots of natural light and fresh air. Other nearby attractions include the Water Puppet theatre, Hanoi's Old Quarter, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum and the Temple of Literature.

This apartment has everything you will need to make your stay in Hanoi a comfortable and enjoyable experience. More than just a place to stay, it will be your home in Hanoi. Price includes electricity, cable tv, wifi and weekly cleaning.

description:

The space
The studio located in center of Cau giay District, close to new US embassy, universities as Hanoi Education university, Vietnam National university, University of Language... supermarket as Big C, parks, banks, bus stations nearby around. You can easy go to Noibai airport by bus N07(price 7000VND) or old quarter by bus 9B( price 7000VND) at bus station near studio (250m) or can easy go other provinces out Hanoi by bus at My Dinh bus station( 1,1km). On early morning or evening you can walk (500m) to Caugiay park to have relax, or you can visit the museum of Ethnography(1.7km) by bus 39. And most important things is hospitality and ready to help you from the host .

Guest access
You will use free wifi, can cook in the kitchen or keep your foods in the fridge, used washing machine at room, as well as the balcony for have relax or drying clothers.

During your stay
The host is always ready to support the guest.
Please kindly note that we have a black Siamese cat in our house and he is very friendly. Sometime he can ask to get into your room and stay there for a bit. However please do not feed any strange food to him. Thank you.

Other things to note
As we are living as a family in this house and the other family members are working, it is required to keep silent after 10pm.
You can go out and come back late at night (2am) but please let us know in advance and we will appreciate if it is just once or twice per week.

listing_name: Unique Hanoi old quarter APT*2Bdr*2Balc*2Bath*
description:
Apartment located in the heart of Hanoi
In the old French historic building, many big windows
It is walkable to every attractions; walking street, night market, food street, 600m away from Hoan Kiem lake.
Is penthouse, 2 floors (3&4th) 130sqm, 2 bedrooms, 2 balconies, 1 big living room, kitchen, dinning area.
Newly repaired by European recently.
Staircases, no wheelchair access
Security, privacy & quiet
Friendly neighbor
(A portion of the revenue is sponsored for the deaf school in Pakistan )

The space
The total usage area in 2 floors is about 130sqm (including 2 balconies, one balcony each floor). The first floor includes the big living room and the kitchen area, dining table, bar table, 2 refrigerators, tablewares, wine cabinet, wine glass, hot and cold water machine, comfortable sofa and table, TV, Wifi, book shelf, cabinet, cupboard, 2AC with 45,000BTU each...etc.

There are 2.5 bedrooms (including one folding bed when needed) and 2 bathrooms on second floor each bedroom has 01 King- size bed, bed liner, AC...etc. There is a big and beautiful wooden staircase to the second floor where there is a nice space with a reading chair near to the big window.

There are many nice paintings inside the 2- floor apartment and also many big glass windows and two skylights above the living room which allow natural light to come in. Besides the natural light the apartment is installed with many yellow soft lights which make the rooms so beautiful and romantic in the evening.

In addition, there are also many green plants outside the windows and balconies which make us feel that we are very close to nature. The spaces of both floor are big, very comfortable to stay in but also very cozy and quiet when doors are closed. This is really a hidden charm in the old quarter of the capital of Vietnam.

You will feel safe and being supported quickly because our family ( my wife, 2 children and me) also live in the same building, in different apartment. Your privacy is always the first priority.

From the apartment, it is workable to many interesting attractions like Hoan Kiem lake, Trang Tien shopping center, walking street, food street, night market, railway coffee, Hoa Lo Maison old prison, Longbien bridge, water puppet show, jazz club, Hanoi opera house, woman museum, Hochiminh mausoleum, convinient shops, laundry shops, spa, booking offices, money exchange shops, SIM shops…etc . Many nice coffee shops with some special coffees like egg coffee or salt coffee around.

Guest access
Guests are allowed to use the whole apartment as their house including bedrooms, bathrooms, kitchen, living room, dinning and working tables, sofa, folding bed, aircon, TV, Wifi, balconies, refrigerators, wine cabinet, coffee machine..etc.

Other things to note
* If some on want to experience how to make famous local food like spring roll, bun cha ( grilled pork with noodle)...etc please discuss with us then we may organize it together.

* The apartment is a part of the historic building. The building is the old French building which used to be the very famous Publishing House called Tan Dan which could be found in google. The building was built in 1937 with French design which is beautiful and quality of the house is still in good condition. In the past most of the most famous writers and poets in the North of Vietnam worked for this Publishing House.

* The staircase to the apartment is seperated. The apartment is in the right old quarter but it is very quiet when doors are closed. The apartment has nice view, privacy, been surrounded by lot of trees and flowers which does not make you feel that you are in the heart of the Capital of Vietnam. However, when you go down to the street it is very active. From our place you can walk to every attractions in my recommendation list.

* PLZ be noted that we keep the original floor tiles almost 100 years as a part of history of the flat. There may be some small marks on the surface of some tiles but actually they are not the dirts. We have our own cleaner and the apartment are cleaned carefully before guests check in.

* Many guests said that the apartment is more beautiful than in the pictures. They love the apartment and if they dont have some thing to do outside then they want to enjoy by keeping staying inside :)

* Guests can check in themselves; However, we always want to see them to say hello and help to carry luggage and give some instructions so we normally see guests in Hangbong street and take guests to the apartment.

* In case, you want us to arrange the car to pick up at the airport we can help to arrange without profit but you will pay for the driver

* We have been donating a partial income for the deaf school monthly. (We have track record for this)

listing_name: Garden house center of Old quarter
description:
An Eco-Green Homestay in the Heart of Hanoi

Welcome to our eco-friendly haven, nestled in the heart of Hanoi’s historic Old Quarter, where our family has lived since the 20th century.

Your private room is newly built on the top floor, featuring a balcony overlooks our lush garden, which we lovingly care for every day.

We offer an authentic homestay experience, blending local charm with modern comfort—all at an irresistible price.

The space
1. Location:

We are one of the few houses in Hanoi’s Old Quarter that still keeps the traditional 100-year-old Hanoian home style - local shops and eateries are right at our doorstep, but hear the hustle and bustle of the street instantly disappear as you step through our entrance inside a small alleyway. Ascend the central staircase full of sunlight and greenery to your private, homey room in the heart of Hanoi.

2. Your Space:

This super-quiet modern 35-square-meter room is large and full of natural light and includes a spacious private bathroom.

Whether you’re traveling for business or pleasure, getting good sleep is key to having enough energy to power through your days away from home.Understand that , we have set A king-size bed with spring mattress and a standard topper , we ensure to bring you quality sleep

Your private balcony overlooks our central atrium’s hanging garden which is looked after by my father every day and includes flowers all year long. It’s the perfect place to have your morning coffee or to chill out after a day of exploring the city!

The room also includes a strong WiFi connection, a private ice-cold air conditioning unit, and a refrigerator for keeping those drinks ice-cold.

Your room is located on the 4th floor and you will have the entire level to yourself (we do not have an elevator).

3. Living Like a Local:

We are in the thick of Hanoi’s Old Quarter where streetside eateries and coffee shops abound. At night the streets come to life with even more eateries and night markets popping up to serve the masses of people looking to do some shopping and to share a meal with friends and family. Only at around 3am will the streets start to grow quiet. If you’re still awake at this time you can enjoy a quiet stroll among the beautiful empty streets, only to see them explode with life again when the daylight comes!

4. Safety:

We are located in a very safe area of town and walking around is encouraged - even if you arrive home late from a night out.

5. Services We Offer:

My work and passion is in the hospitality and tourism industry. My experience as a tour consultant means that I can provide you with the very best advice for your travels around - northern Vietnam and relieve you of the stress of booking and planning your holiday.

Airport transfer to our doorstep:

For your convenience and to avoid unnecessary loss of time, I will help you arrange an airport transfer. The driver will arrive punctually at the arrival terminal and hold a welcome board bearing your name; he will then drive you directly to my house. The cost will be the same as the market price - $16 for one way

We have partnerships with a wide array of tour operators and can arrange your tours around northern Vietnam at excellent rates - Ha Long, Sapa, Ha Giang, Ninh Binh, you name it. Local tours are also available such as city tours, cooking classes and food tours.

Our most popular tours are the FREE student tours - our bubbly team of students are always looking forward to interacting with foreigners to indulge in cultural and language exchange! They will take you around the city on their motorbike and be your tour guide, stopping at many places to tell you about the history and even getting a bite or two of the local food. If your time is limited this is *the* tour to get. Please inform me in advance so I can check for availability.

If you have an early arrival or late check-out we can arrange for luggage storage if the room is not ready at these times.

6. Other:

If you are looking for a quiet place to stay for your family or a group of friends, we have other homes that can accommodate up to 5 guests each. Please contact us

Guest access
You will be provided with a key that gives you full access to the house at all hours of the day.

Other things to note
Please take note that the room is on 4th floor of the house so you will need to climb with the staircase

We want to ensure a seamless check-in process for you, and we kindly request your cooperation in providing us with your passport information.

As an online-based service, we have made it convenient for you to submit your passport details electronically. Please follow one of the two options below:

Airbnb message or our Hotline number . Rest assured that your information will be handled with the utmost care and privacy.

By providing your passport information in advance, we can efficiently register your stay with the appropriate authorities. This procedure is in compliance with local regulations and enables us to maintain a safe and welcoming environment for all our guests.

To maintain our commitment to environmental sustainability, we have made some eco-friendly choices. As part of our efforts to reduce waste and protect the environment, we have decided not to provide toothbrushes and toothpaste. However, don't worry, we have taken care of your basic toiletry needs by providing shower gel, shampoo, and fresh towels.

We kindly ask you to please remember to bring your own toothbrush and toothpaste. This small gesture will contribute to our collective efforts in promoting a greener and healthier planet.
Should you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to our support team. We are available around the clock to assist you.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We look forward to hosting you and ensuring you have a pleasant and memorable experience with us.

listing_name: The Hanoi Family Villa 2
description:
My place is close to public transport, local eateries, hospitals, nightlife, and just $2 by taxi or $1 by bus to the city center and tourist spots. You’ll love the cozy atmosphere, natural light, comfy bed, well-equipped kitchen, and washer/dryer. The neighborhood offers a genuine Vietnamese experience, with friendly locals, away from tourist crowds.

Ideal for couples, solo travelers, business guests, families (with kids), pets, and foreign students staying long-term.

The space
Welcome to one of the most unique homes in Hanoi, offering a truly authentic Vietnamese experience. My house features a serene fish pond and two beautiful gardens, perfect for relaxing with breakfast or tea. Inside, you'll find a spacious, fully equipped kitchen, ideal for preparing your own meals, and a large common area with a 55-inch TV and free Netflix for your entertainment.

The room is designed for comfort and productivity, boasting a king-size bed, two large desks for ample working space, and fast Wi-Fi. The spacious bathroom and modern air conditioning ensure your stay is comfortable in all seasons. This accommodation is ideal for long-term foreign students and expats looking for a comfortable, well-equipped, and culturally immersive place to stay.

With the home’s extensive amenities like a fully equipped kitchen, cozy living spaces, and beautiful outdoor areas, you’ll feel right at home while enjoying both comfort and privacy.

description:
Are you ready to stay in an once-upon-a-time French villa room and experience living like locals in a very unique house?

Our nest is only 10' on motorbike to Hoan Kiem lake, 5' to HUST, 1' to Vincom mall, 5' to HN train/airport bus station. You’ll love our house because of comfy bed, two work desks, an ergonomic chair, well-equipped and personal space.

We offer NETFLIX + FREE drinking water!

Our house is excellent for couples, solo adventurers, business travelers.

Welcome!

The space
- Our place is a 2-story house in a little iconic alley in Hanoi:
+ Ground floor: private washing machine room + common space of the whole commune.
+ FIRST floor: ~18m2 living room/main bedroom with comfy bed (Queen size - 1m6x2m) and work desk.
>>> NOTE: you'll need to use a staircase (half indoor half outdoor) to get upstairs. The door in the middle of the stair is 160cm height x 50cm width. Would be challenging if you’re tall.

++The bathroom is furnished with comfy toilet and shower. There are 2 windows with curtains and a little skylight.

Guest access
Guest can use first and second floor. Guess can also access to washing machine on ground floor.

Other things to note
In our neighborhood, there are mostly elderly people whose English is very limited. Don't worry so much if you cannot communicate with them, please reach to us (Mariana or Kate) for further support.

listing_name: Homestay Fifth Floor Apartment
description:
Stay in a bright, peaceful 50 m² private apartment in central Hanoi, just a 10-minute walk from Hoan Kiem Lake. Located on the 5th floor of our family home in a safe neighbourhood, it offers full privacy, natural light, strong WiFi, air-conditioning, a fully equipped kitchen, and free laundry. Ideal for couples, long stays, and digital nomads seeking comfort and local experience. Electricity is charged separately. Weekend guests are invited to enjoy a home-cooked family dinner.

The space
If you’re looking for more than just a room — if you’d like to experience real Hanoi life while still enjoying full privacy — our home may be perfect for you.

The 50 m² apartment is on the 5th floor of our family house at 77A Tho Nhuom Street, in central Hanoi. Three generations live here: my wife and I (both retired), our two sons and their families, and our granddaughters. We are a warm, respectful, and welcoming family.

The apartment itself is completely private, including your own bedroom, living room, kitchen, and bathroom. You will have your own keys and may come and go freely at any time.

To reach the apartment, you enter through our shared front door and walk up the stairs (no elevator). On the way, you’ll pass our kitchen — sometimes filled with the smell of home cooking 😊

What You’ll Enjoy

• Queen-size bed and wardrobe
• Spacious bathroom with strong hot shower
• Comfortable living room
• Fully equipped kitchen (large fridge, microwave, cookware, dining table)
• Air-conditioners in both bedroom and living room
• Two large work desks — ideal for remote work
• Strong, reliable WiFi throughout
• Rooftop access
• Safe for valuables

The apartment is bright and airy, with large windows and plenty of natural light — a rare feature in central Hanoi.

What’s Included

• Free use of our laundry room (2 washing machines + drying space)
• One 18.5L bottle of Lavie drinking water every two weeks
• A family dinner invitation if you stay over the weekend

Electricity is charged separately based on usage (the apartment has its own meter). In summer (April–July), it is usually around USD 1 per day if one air-conditioner is used. In cooler months, it is about USD 0.5 per day or less.

Location

We are located in Hoan Kiem District, just a short 10-minute walk to beautiful Hoan Kiem Lake. The area is safe, lively, and full of local restaurants, cafés, markets, and supermarkets. Everything you need is within walking distance.

We are always happy to help you settle in and recommend our favorite local places.

Staying here gives you the best of both worlds:
✔ Complete privacy
✔ Central location
✔ Real Vietnamese family atmosphere

• We appreciate non-smoking guests

Hanoi Zodi Apartment Hotel accommodate room with full natural light, located in Trieu Viet Vuong street at the heart of Hai Ba Trung district. 2 bedrooms, 1 living room, 1 kitchen and 1 bathroom. 2 King-size beds, 1 couch and 1 air/floor mattress. Neighbour on Trieu Viet Vuong street full of wonderful restaurants and cafes, near Thong Nhat park, Vincom Tower big shoping mall, cinema, and also the coziness, the light. Security guards 24/24 and free common parking space for motobikes

Excellent for big family, travellers, and businessmen or group of tourists, located on 156 Trieu Viet Vuong street, full of shops, cafes, restaurants, banks on working time but very cozy and silent at night. - Free drinking water

GROCERY STORE/CORNER STORE

FAVORITE NEIGHBORHOOD RESTAURANT
•iSushi - Buffet Nhật Bản Address: 158 Triệu Việt Vương, Phố Huế, Hai Bà Trưng, Hà Nội, serve Japanese foods, next to the apartment
•Nam Chen restaurant, 18 Doan Tran Nghiep street, nearby, 3 minutes on foot, where you can enjoy our best chines foods and a lot of others.
•Paris Gateaux Bakerry, 30 To Hien Thanh street, 1 minutes on foot, one of Top 10 best quality bakery in Hanoi
•Bún chả Obama (Bún chả Hương Liên), 24 Lê Văn Hưu street, the restaurant that serve Bún Chả - a traditional Vietnamese food, 15 minutes onfoot, where President Obama used to have lunch with his assistant and a lot of Vietnamese customers. They loved Bún Chả very much.
BEST COFFEE SHOP
•Thai Café, 27 Triệu Việt Vương street, 7 minutes onfoot, one of the top ten old cafeteria in Hanoi. Interesting because of the price and good coffee (Café Sua da – coffe milk sake) .
•Highlands coffee, Outside Groud floor of Vincom center, good view and good coffee, modern cafeteria, alittle more expensive than Thai Café.
•Starbucks Coffee – 314 BA TRIEU , 5 munites onfoot, 500m
NEARBY PARK OR GREEN SPACE
•Thống Nhất park, the biggest park in Hanoi, 10 minutes on foot, where a lot of Hanoi people doing morning exercises and afternoon exercises.
•Hoàn Kiếm lake and Old corner of Hanoi, of course you must go there to enjoy our Hanoi.

listing_name: Holly's Casa -Balcony Charm in Ha Noi Old Quarters
description:
Experience Hanoi’s Old Quarter from a lively, central base. This 4th-floor walk-up apartment puts you just minutes from Hoan Kiem Lake, Quan Chuong Gate and Dong Xuan Market, and countless street food spots. Expect the buzz of the streets during the day and calmer nights. Inside, enjoy a comfy double bed, sofa bed, air-con, fast Wi-Fi, kitchenette, and a small balcony for coffee or people-watching. Ideal for travelers who want local charm, walkable sights, and a homey space to return to.

The space
My Airbnb provides an inviting retreat after a day of exploration in the Old Quarter. This 1 bedroom, 1 bathroom apartment boasts a harmonious blend of modern comfort and traditional Vietnamese charm. With ample natural light, wooden furnishings, and colorful accents, you'll immediately feel at home.
One of the highlights of my Airbnb is the private balcony, where you can enjoy your morning coffee or evening cocktail while watching the city come to life or wind down after a day of exploring. It's the perfect spot to relax and take in the sights and sounds of Hanoi.
Despite having only 1 bedroom, the apartment has a sofa that would perfectly fit for another person. Whether you're a solo traveler, a couple on a romantic getaway, or a group of friends exploring Hanoi, my Airbnb in the Old Quarter is the perfect home base for your adventures.

Guest access
High-Speed Wi-Fi: Many of my previous guests have been digital nomads who have successfully conducted calls, worked remotely, and even taken online courses from the apartment without any issues. Feel free to share your travel experiences and stay connected with loved ones using my reliable Wi-Fi connection.

Fully-equipped kitchen: Whip up your favorite Vietnamese dishes or enjoy a cup of traditional Vietnamese coffee to start your day.

Smart TV: Unwind on the cozy sofa and enjoy the latest blockbusters or indulge in entertainment from YouTube or Netflix – everything is conveniently set up for your enjoyable stay.

Private balcony: Step outside to our charming balcony, where you can soak in the sights and sounds of the Old Quarter. It's the perfect spot for sipping a refreshing drink in the evenings.

Air conditioning: Stay cool and comfortable during Hanoi's warm summers.

Laundry facilities: Make use of the washing machine to keep your clothes fresh.

Other things to note
FEEDBACK: I highly appreciate your experiences during your stay at my property. Should you encounter any concerns, please don't hesitate to share your feedback. I am eager to listen and confident that we can work together to find a solution.

STAIRS: My Casa is located on the 4th floor and does not have an elevator/lift. Access to the property will require climbing stairs, so please keep this in mind if you are traveling with heavy luggage or have any knee-related concerns.

NOISE: Hanoi is a vibrant city, and some level of noise is inevitable, especially when staying in the lively Old Quarter. To enhance your comfort, I've thoughtfully provided earplugs in the apartment. Please feel free to use them if you're a light sleeper, as I want to ensure you have a restful stay.

AIRPORT PICK-UP: I offer airport transportation service with a fee of 18 USD for a 4-seat car and 20 USD for a 7-seat car. Upon your arrival at the airport, a driver holding a sign with your name will be ready to greet you at the terminal gate and ensure a hassle-free journey directly to the apartment. You will never get lost with this option.

TOUR SERVICES: As an experienced host, I have established connections with trusted travel agencies, allowing me to offer you exclusive and competitive rates for tours to some of Vietnam's most renowned destinations. If you're interested in experiencing local service providers, please feel free to reach out, and I'll be delighted to assist you in planning your adventures.

LAUNDRY: In addition to providing a washing machine in the apartment, I offer a convenient laundry pickup service at a rate of 35,000 VND per kilogram. Our trusted service provider will collect your clothes and return them within 3 hours.

SMOKING: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartment, but you are welcome to enjoy your cigarette on the balcony.

PET APPROVAL: Prior approval is necessary for guests traveling with pets. Please inform me in advance if you plan to bring a pet with you.

Should you have any other requests or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out. I'm always here to assist you during your stay.

listing_name: Modern Apt. in Colonial Villa Facing the West Lake
description:
The listing is a newly renovated & fully equipped 55m2 duplex with 2 bedrooms, a large living room, comfortable bathroom and kitchen.
The house is in Hanoi's heritage list for its Vietnamese-Chinese & French architecture. It is in Hanoi’s most prestigious, green & safe area.
It faces the West Lake & behind it is the PM’s Office & City's oldest botanic garden.
From the Apt., Hanoi's most visited monuments & sites are just within a walking distance while it is only 40 mins to the Int'l Airport.

The space
WE NOT ONLY SHARE THE HOUSE BUT A HISTORICAL AND CULTURAL VALUE OF THE CAPITAL CITY.

The listing is a separate apartment that guarantees complete privacy for guests. The apartment is a part of a very spacious house which is a conserved building for its subtle and harmonious combination of Vietnamese, Chinese and French architecture. The house has big windows in all directions - a very rare case in crowded Hanoi.

The apartment itself has a big entrance door, two big windows and four small windows open to 3 directions.

The living or common rooms are spacious with high ceiling and, like all other rooms, they are fully and modernly furbished to ensure comfortable feelings and convenience for stayers.

Other interesting features include the old-fashioned Vietnamese curving roof and its hard wood structure with many letters \Longevity\" in Mandarin character carved into it. The old-style brick tiles were imported from France more than one hundred years ago are well preserved and protected.

By choosing this place

with some trees and a school stadium in between it and the house’s big veranda of over 60m2.

Our sleep setting includes 1 queen bed + 1 double bed, comfortably accommodating 4 guests.

Our family personally prepare the room for you with fresh bed linens and towels with high cleanliness standards.

Provided amenities include:
- Queen-size (160x200cm) and Double bed size (140x200cm) with Memory Foam Therapeutic mattress with fresh clean beddings and towels for every stay.
- FREE fast Wifi
- FLEXIBLE SELF-CHECKIN 24/7
- FREE & UNLIMITED fresh drinking (RO-filtered) water
- FREE instant noodle + FREE tea/ coffee
- FREE LAUNDRY (a 5kg batch per week for 2 guest or a batch of 10 kg per week for 3-4 guests) + FREE CLEANING WEEKLY for stays of 7+ days, scheduled by your convenient time. Laundry servicing available for short stays (under 7 days) at 1.2USD/kg for clothes to return in less than 24 hrs. Alternatively there is a laundromat nearby just 1 minute walk that can do your laundry for 0.4 USD/kg

Guest access
This Airbnb unit takes up most of the first floor of our 3-floor house. My family (my parents of 70+ years old, me and my husband and our toddler daughter) now live on the second and third floor of the same house. My parents spend every 2-3 months with us and the next 2-3 months in our other home in the south.

You’ll have full access to the guest suite with SEPARATE ENTRANCE and lock.

A Guest suite is usually part of a home, which might share hallway or storage area with the main home's structure but come with separate entrance and extended amenities like dedicated pantry or full kitchen and a dedicated bathroom. Guest suite is usually dedicated to the homeowner's invited guests who come for a short visit.

My family will take care of your daily request promptly (receiving e-commerce packages, letters, being a contact point for hospitals or any other errands) and refill your supplies as needed, and even lend you any additional household items you may need during your stay (extra blankets/ some specific cooking tools/ oil or sugar, etc..).

Our guest suite layout in linear order - on the same floor (from your entrance):
1. Guest's main room (bedroom + living area)
2. Common luggage/ storage room (This room is for luggage drop-off for before check-in time or after checkout time). Our family has an entrance across this room to the upper floor
3. Guest's private kitchen
4. Guest's private bathroom

Other things to note

listing_name: Old Quarter/2 seperate rooms/Quiet/Free Wash & Dry
description:
Our cozy 4-storey home is thoughtfully designed to offer both comfort and privacy:
1st Floor (the ground floor) – A welcoming shared space where guests can relax, cook in the fully equipped kitchen, enjoy meals at the dining area, and securely store their luggage.

2nd Floor – Reserved for staff only to ensure seamless service and support.

3rd Floor: Giraffe Room

4th Floor: Tribal Vibes Room (the Rooftop)

With this link, you have full access to both the 3rd and 4th floor.

The space
As we had mentioned before, you will have full access to both the 3rd and 4th floor.

THE GIRAFFE ROOM (3rd floor): Located on the 3rd floor, the Giraffe Room is a unique retreat blending wild African spirit with the rustic charm of Vietnamese bamboo.
The centerpiece is a cozy house-shaped bed framed by natural bamboo beams. A pull-out trundle bed is thoughtfully provided underneath, allowing the room to comfortably accommodate up to 4 guests — perfect for families or groups of friends seeking both togetherness and privacy.
The room features a large window overlooking ancient rooftops, flooding the space with natural light and a sense of old-world tranquility.
Your private bathroom is equipped with a smart Japanese-style toilet and a rare 3-point rainfall shower — delivering water from above, the wall, and a handheld shower.

THE TRIBAL VIBES ROOM (THE ROOFTOP): Perched on the 4th floor, this private rooftop room offers a truly unique retreat right in the heart of the Old Quarter.
Step out onto a cozy balcony surrounded by lush greenery, where you can relax in the fresh air, sip your coffee, and enjoy the view of the iconic red-tiled rooftops — a familiar, peaceful sight of the Old Quarter.
The highlight of the space is the modern outdoor jacuzzi — a perfect place to soak under the starry sky and let all your worries float away with the warm water.
Inside, a cozy bedroom and a small, private bathroom are thoughtfully designed to create a peaceful and inspiring atmosphere.
Whether it's quiet afternoons watching the city or starry nights full of magic, this rooftop room promises unforgettable moments, deeply infused with the spirit of Hanoi.

Guest access
You’ll have full private access to the Giraffe room (3rd floor) and the Tribal Vibes room (the 4th floor- the rooftop).
Common spaces (1st floor and public area) are shared with warmth and respect.
Self-check-in is available for your convenience.
We provide complimentary WiFi, pocket wifi (8GB/day), drinking water, and all essential amenities to make your stay seamless.

During your stay
Your journey is your own — we’re here whenever you need us!
We offer self check-in for smooth, flexible arrival.
Throughout your stay, we are available via Airbnb message, phone, or social internet for any support, travel tips, or recommendations.
We’re happy to help make your trip to Hanoi easy, comfortable, and full of local charm — but we always respect your privacy and space.

Other things to note
• Our homestay is tucked away in a peaceful alley — taxis can drop you nearby, and you’ll walk a short distance to the house.

• Please note there is no elevator. However, the stairs are wide and gently sloped, making it easy to walk up without feeling tired.

• FREE luggage storage is available for early arrivals or late departures.

• FREE pocket WiFi (8GB/day) so you can stay connected on the go.

• Daily cleaning service is available upon request.

• We genuinely care about your experience — we’re just a message away if you need anything, and we’re happy to share local tips to make your stay unforgettable!

listing_name: Cozy sunny room downtown Hanoi
description:
Our house was built in 2000 and renovated 5 years ago.

The bedroom is on the 4th floor of the house, located in one of the quieter and historically older streets in the city.
You can find in the vicinity a variety of services, including restaurants, hair salons, and supermarkets.
The Old Quarter is approximately 5 minutes away by foot, so you can easily explore Hanoi’s main tourist attraction and enjoy many exciting activities.

The space
It's a house located on one of the less crowded streets with ample green space and in close approximation to the center of the city, just 5 minutes away from the Hanoi Opera House.
The room is 12 square meters (~130 square ft), cozy in the winter and cool in the summer due to the advantageous location inside the house.

Guest access
⚠️ Two-night guests will be quoted 50.000vnd for access to the washing machine.

You have access to Wifi, TV and kitchen (on the 2nd floor), washing machine (5th floor), shared bathroom with hand sanitizer available.

Please be noted does not include other amenities like shampoo, body wash, toothpaste, face wash, etc.

The wifi bandwidth will be upgraded starting from Jan. 2018. However signals could be affected by neighboring wifi systems.

During your stay
I am working far from home so it will mostly just be online communication. My dad can speak French to lovely guests from French-speaking countries. My mom doesn't speak any foreign languages, however.

When I'm home, I can show you around if you are in need of some companion to guide you through the hectic alleyways around Hanoi. This is rare, as for now.

Other things to note
For guests who stay for a long period, you may stumble upon one of my mom's homemade meals, traditional Hanoi food. We sometimes invite guests over for lunch or dinner.

If you need any help, from calling Grab to putting up an itinerary for your city trip, I'm here to help.

listing_name: Wooden House
description:
The Wooden House is a famous bungalow with especially impressive architecture. The wooden house is like a great music played in the middle of immense pine forest on Mount Soc. The bungalow is designed as a tiny wooden box lying precariously between the mountainside with an area of only 15m2, but still has all the necessary amenities with air conditioning, hot water and private bathroom

The space
The bed at the Wooden House is located close to the large tempered glass door with curtains, which ensures privacy for visitors to rest and offers you a wonderful view straight towards the forest valley, extremely poetic and dreamy.

Not only that, this place is also generously dedicated to a 5-person dip in the middle of the natural , just soak in the cool source of spring water, just raise your head to watch the pine trees rejoice in the sunshine.

Guest access
• Area: 15m²
• Large bed by the glass wall
• Wooden table and chairs inside
• En-suite bathroom (shower)
• Air conditioning, fan, mini refrigerator, electric kettle, hairdryer
• Tea table and bean bag chair on private outdoor patio
• Outdoor relaxation soaking pool

listing_name: 402-Lan’s homestay room 402 - Off 70%/1 month
description:
My home is located in a lane on Trang Tien Street ( This room is on the 4th floor with a balcony). It takes about 45 minutes from Noi Bai Airport to my home. You can catch the bus express 86 to get to my home and it only costs you 30,000 vnd.Living here you are in the heart of Hanoi. You can experience Hanoian life style.

The space
Walking out of my house,it’s convenient for you to get to places: about 200m to Hoan Kiem Lake, about 400m to Hanoi Opera House, about 750m to the Thang Long Water Puppet, about 600m to Historical Museum, about 700m to St Joseph Cathedral, about 1km to the night market which is opened from 8 p.m to 12 p.m every Friday, Saturday and Sunday night. In addition, my home is easily accessible to Hanoi Old Quarter. Ha Noi Old Quarter definitely has so many interesting cultural places for you to visit. Ha Noi Old Quarter consists of many small, meandering streets, each bears the name of the goods that was specifically traded there such as Hang Bac (Silver Product), Hang Ma (Paper Product), Hang Go (Wood Product), just to name a few.To the modern life, you should visit Ta Hien Street. Ta Hien is a small street lying in famous Old Quarter of Hanoi, near Hoan Kiem Lake.It is one of the most crowded streets in Old Quarter particularly and in Hanoi generally. It is named “international crossroad”, drawing many foreign visitors and also Hanoi people. On the small and crowded street of Ta Hien, you can find variety of best Hanoi street foods such as Nem chua, Vietnamese bread, noodles, sweet porridges,… Especially, in summer, Ta Hien is famous for beer.

Guest access
In the room has a king size bed, a refrigerator, air conditioner, a microwave, Tv, high speed internet, private bathroom. (There is no kitchen inside the room.)

Other things to note
If you plan to rent the room for over 1 month we will give you 50% off
A deposit will be required upon check in

listing_name: Blue Room. Home Of An Architect
description:
A private room with a private adjoining bathroom in a 4-story house on the campus of the University of Arts. Big window with full of natural light. Suitable for couples, travelers, especially solo girls who love art & looking for a safety place. The owner is an architect who designed the house with love. Not in tourist center but allow to discover Hanoi within walking distance & see Hanoi differently.

The space
- Blue room: we offer you a cozy room on the 3rd floor with a queen-size bed, a small sofa & a private bathroom. A big window with the garden view over the front yard with green trees, where you can enjoy the birds singing in early morning.
- The sofa can be converted into a single bed
- Bathroom is private. The Blue room includes a private bathroom but it is outside and access by a short corridor, just 2 steps from the door, on the same floor. Other guests can access through this corridor to the pantry.
- My place have 3 rooms for Airbnb guests. There are two other rooms (Yellow and Green) that shared a bathroom on the 2nd floor.
- All guests are free to enjoy our beautiful terrace in the 3rd floor. The semi-open pantry is the place you yourself can serve a light cooking, then relax with a cup of coffee or a book.
- A small cafe is on the 1st floor and front yard, that opens from 8:30 am - 6:00 pm. It is not busy because it mainly to serve Artist-teachers & students of The University.
- Laundry area is on the 4th floor: free using washing machine. If you would like to use the dryer after the washing machine complete, the fee is 60,000 VND per time. Kindly leave the fee of using the dryer in the room before you check out.
- A small store is available to keep your luggage for free as required.
- Car / motorcycle park (fees apply) is nearby in the University parking.
- Staying our host will be quiet and safe as we are next to the area of security 24/7 by the University.
- Convenient to take public bus, sky train, bus rapid express to every corners of Hanoi: bus No 90 to & from airport, bus No 23, bus 49 to the Old Quarter etc.
- Near US Embassy, Hoang Cau Lake, Thanh Cong Lake

Guest access
- You and other guests staying in 2 rooms on the 2nd floor are welcome to use the semi-open pantry on the 3rd floor: the dining area, kitchen. As well as the front yard areas.
- My host is No 360 La Thanh Street - on the campus of Hanoi University of Arts and Design. From main street of No 360 La Thanh Street, come down slope around 50 met into the University, before reaching the main gate of university please turn right at the 1st Alley (the Alley No 4): you will see my host with Airbnb logo - the house No 9 of the Alley No 4
- Easily to take taxi / Grab from airport to my host, just 40 – 50 mins with cost 300,000 - 350,000 VND. If you book a Grab, please select the address: 9/4/360 La Thanh Street.
- Public buses from the airport to my place: Bus No 90 (ticket 15,000 VND, and just 900 m walking from the last stop); bus #86 (3km), bus #68 (1.5 km), bus #7 (1.5km).
- My house with 3 private bedrooms exclusively for Airbnb guests. You will be given a set of keys for self-check-in easily and no time limitation required. My parents live in a next-door house and are always available for support as required.
- Easy-to-access public transport, just few minutes walking to bus stops to the Temple of Literature, the Old Quarter, Ho Chi Minh mausoleum, Women’s Museum, Opera House, Tran Quoc Pagoda, Quan Thanh Pagoda, West Lake and all corner of Ha Noi (bus #23, #50, #49, #146)
- Also a few minutes’ walk away is Hoang Cau Street or Hao Nam Street were called local street food area.

During your stay
- I don't live in the host and I maybe here on most occasions but not always. I am available when needed.
- My parent, retired artist teachers live in the next-door house & always available for helping guests any time.
- Travelling is our hobbies, that why we really want to share our experiences collected from our trips across country with guests.

Other things to note
- NO SMOKING inside the bedroom.
- The toilet and bathroom are combined into one room due to my location's limited space. Private bathroom but it is outside the room, on the same floor just 1 step from the room door.
- The other guests can access the corridor to the pantry and kitchen but there is a special note in the door that bathroom is private.
- Hot water, towels & good quality of toiletries are provided.
- Check in time is 14:00 & check out time 12:00. For well receiving you, please advise your check in time in advance. Self check in: keys are stored in a lock-box (code will be provided before checking in).
- For surveillance: we have security cameras in the front gate and Cafe area on the 1st floor.
- Laundry area on the 4th floor: using washing machine for free but if you use the dry machine the fee is 60,000 VND per time.
- If the keys are lost by any reasons, kindly pay me 90,000 VND to do a new set of keys.
- Air-condition with cool only, no heat.
- A portable electric heat or a electric blanket are available upon requested.
- According to Vietnamese Law, accommodation providers are legally required to register the temporary residence of all guests with local authorities. Therefore you are required to provide a picture of your passport before checking in.
- I want to do everything to make your stay more comfortable.

Guest access

From main street of No 360 La Thanh Street, come down slope around 50 met into the University, before reaching the main gate of university please turn right at the 1st Alley (the Alley No 4): you will see my host with Airbnb logo - the house No 9 of the Alley No 4

- My house with 3 private bedrooms exclusively for Airbnb guests. You will be given a set of keys for self-check-in easily and no time limitation required. My parents live in a next-door house and are always available for support as required.
- Easy-to-access public transport, just few minutes walking to bus stops to the Temple of Literature, the Old Quarter, Ho Chi Minh mausoleum, Women’s Museum, Opera House, Tran Quoc Pagoda, Quan Thanh Pagoda, West Lake and all corner of Ha Noi (bus #23, #50, #49, #146)

During your stay

Other things to note

It boasts 2 big windows so the rooms are most naturally bright and airy. The studio is an ideal choice for groups of 1 – 2 people. It is in a central location with local neighborhood, very close to big lakes, parks, bus stops, supermarkets, restaurants…, and especially just 3km from Hanoi’s Old Quarter.

The space

The house features: Ground Floor: motorbike parking, shared washing machine and clothing dryer. Second to fifth floor: each floor has 01 private apartment and 01 private studio. Rooftop: orchids + flower pots + small vegetable boxes + aquariums + chairs + tables.

Common access to courtyard, and rooftop (with orchids + flower pots + small vegetable boxes + aquariums + chairs + tables) to which you are able to access.

However, we always do our best to help you during your stay so that you will enjoy your stay at Chez Tram Homestay.

2. There is not any lift in the building. There are 02 stairs in the house: 01 private stairs for my family and 01 private stairs for guests.

3. My family lives in the ground floor of the building. So if you need any assistance, my family member (my parents, my brother, my sister or my daughter) is ready to help you with big smiles.

listing_name: Entire French house 4 bedrooms at Hanoi downtown
description:
Nested in an excellent location in the heart of Hanoi Old Quarter area, Loc Homestay is situated in a lovingly typical small lane of Hanoi, therefore brings guests convenience but at the same time is still quiet inside.

With 4 uniquely decorated rooms and suites, just renovated, this homestay offers very comfy beds and living room, kitchen and friendly, welcoming hospitality in a hustle and bustle of Hanoi Old Quarter

The space
Perfectly placed for tranquil visits to Hanoi Old Quarter, Loc Homestay is located on a typical lane, less than a steps walk from the Luong Ngoc Quyen street, one of the main pedestrian streets of the old town during the weekend, and can be reached from either Hang Bac str., or Luong Ngoc Quyen str., without steps.

The homestay is also just footsteps from many of the most important landmarks and points of interest of this fascinating city, Hanoi Old Quarter, including the beaufiful Hoan Kiem lake, the Dong Xuan Market, Coffee street, Beer corner and pubs, among many others. Hoan Kiem lake is just 5 minutes walking from the homestay

Guest access
Originally built in the 20th century, Loc Homestay has been carefully decorated and renovated recently in October 2019 in a style worthy of the heritage of Hanoi Old Quarter, while incorporating an extensive range of modern conveniences and amenities, such as air-conditioning, entire living room and kitchen. All rooms feature with window, fresh air. Some rooms offer you great balconies with the view over the living small lane.

There is a comfort common living room and a kitchen, fitted with a kitchenette and washing machine. A refrigerator is also available, as well as a water purifier and a kettle. There is a private bathroom with a bath or shower and shower in most of unit, along with slippers, free toiletries and a hair dryer. Towels are feature

Other things to note
- The whole entire house located on the first floor (above ground floor) of a building in a small lane (with private access) right in the middle of Hanoi Old Quarter, then central but quiet.

- There are 15 stairs which need to be climbed.

- We have a locked store next to the house where you can drop off your luggage before check in or after check out

- Doing the Declaration of Temporary residence with the government when you staying at our place is required by the goverment (like hotel). It's just to make sure you stay legally in Vietnam and it's also very helpful in case there is any unexpected situation happening. Therefore, please help to cooperate with us. It's appreciated

- Please wash dishes before you leave if you cook

- We have shoes for using inside the house. Kindly take your shoes off

- Smoking is allowed in the balcony (there are 2 big balconies). Please don't smoke inside the living room, bedrooms

listing_name: Private cozy room a walk away from the Opera House
description:
Our house was built in 2000 and renovated 5 years ago.

The bedroom is on the 3rd floor of the house, located in one of the quieter and historically older streets in the city.
You can find in the vicinity a variety of services, including restaurants, hair salons, and supermarkets.
The Old Quarter is approximately 5 minutes away by foot, so you can easily explore Hanoi’s main tourist attraction and enjoy many exciting activities.

The space
It's a house located on one of the less crowded streets with ample green space and in close approximation to the center of the city, just 5 minutes away from the Hanoi Opera House. The room is 12 square meters (~130 square ft), cozy in the winter and cool in the summer due to the advantageous location inside the house.

Guest access
⚠️ Two-night guests will be quoted 50.000vnd for access to the washing machine.

You have access to Wifi, TV and kitchen (on the 2nd floor), washing machine (5th floor), shared bathroom with hand sanitizer available.

Please be noted does not include other amenities like shampoo, body wash, toothpaste, face wash, etc.

The wifi bandwidth will be upgraded starting from Jan. 2018. However signals could be affected by neighboring wifi systems.

During your stay
I am working far from home so it will mostly just be online communication. My dad can speak French to lovely guests from French-speaking countries. My mom doesn't speak any foreign languages, however.

When I'm home, I can show you around if you are in need of some companion to guide you through the hectic alleyways around Hanoi. This is rare, as for now.

Other things to note
For guests who stay for a long period, you may stumble upon one of my mom's homemade meals, traditional Hanoi food. We sometimes invite guests over for lunch or dinner.

If you need any help, from calling Grab to putting up an itinerary for your city trip, I'm here to help.

listing_name: Tiny&Tom Home® A Cozy & Charming Homestay
description:
This cozy, charming house is located in a very beautiful & peaceful area of Hanoi. Tiny&Tom are our lovely kids names so we take that name for our house & hope it sounds lovely to you too! The house is fully furnished with bedrooms, kitchen & bathrooms; providing you with an ideal homestay. Spacious house for big group will make you feel comfortable & relaxed!

Stay with us! We will try our best to make your trip perfect!

Welcome you all to our home!

The space
Our listing is close to the 2nd tallest building in Hanoi City - Lotte Complex Centre, Daewoo hotel, many embassies like Japanese Embassy, Australian Embassy, Swedish Embassy etc... and very close to stunning West Lake, the most beautiful place and largest lake in Hanoi.

Tiny&Tom Home Exploration:
My house has 5 floors with 6 bedrooms, 3 full bathrooms and a half bathroom, the floor plan is as following:
* 1st Floor : Private entrance + Motorbike/Bike parking area + Living room + Kitchen (the 1st Washing machine is under the stairs) + Half bath
* 2nd Floor: Bedroom 201 + Bedroom 202 (shared bathroom 2)
* 3rd Floor: Bedroom 301 + Bedroom 302 (shared bathroom 3)
* 4th Floor: Bedroom 401 + Bedroom 402 (shared bathroom 4)
* 5th Floor: Terrace + small kitchen area + washer and dryer + clothes hanging area. (We have small storage where we put some stuffs)

Guest access
Guests have full access to every shared space of the house, including the parking area, living room, kitchen, shared bathrooms, washers and dryer, the Terrace. Here is a more comprehensive list of amenities and features that will be available to you:
1. Bedrooms: Fresh and clean linens.
2. Bathroom: Fresh and clean towels, shampoo, body wash, toothpaste, new toothbrush, hair dryer in the plastic box of the bathroom.
3. Kitchen: There are some cooking oil, a few sauce selections, salt, pepper, sugar available in the kitchen. If you want to cook a full meal, you may find more groceries at Vinmart, located in the front of the alley where the house is, about 10 steps! You can also use our pots and pans, cooking and eating utensils, bowls, plates and mugs. Please make sure you clean up after yourself, thank you!
4. Ironing: An iron and an ironing board are stored on the 4th floor, under the steel stairs to the rooftop. Please return them back to this spot when you are finished.
5. Laundry:
The 1st washing machine is on the 1st floor, under the stairs.
The 2nd washing machine is on the 5th floor and next to it, there is a dryer. If the dryer is in use, you can also hang your laundry in the open clothes hanging area, also on the 5th floor.
6. Rooftop Terrace: This space you can use for sitting and relax while seeing the street's life.
7. Others: Bluetooth Speaker is supplied if needed. We have SmartTV in the kitchen and other one in bedroom in 2nd floor.

Other things to note
+ Please note that this is a private house, not a hotel. So please follow the instructions, clean up after yourself, and kindly respect our home.
+ Slippers, which you can easily find in the shoe cabinet should be used when you are in the house, barefoot is not recommended.

The house is really a place you have to go, away from the hustle and bustle of the center but still close to many attractions, and walkable to everywhere.
Vyan is a fully furnished house can host up to 5 guests with 3 Bdr (2 queen size beds + 1 kid bed), 3 bathrooms and a backyard terrace garden.

The space
You will feel special from the first steps through the ancient greeting gate as the stamp of history. Then there are two rows of flowering trees blooming all year round before reaching the old French Villa. Over years, the ancient villas not only carry the focal point between French culture and Vietnamese culture but also witnesses to each period of vivid history of Vietnam.
Now many ancient villas have been demolished or newly built, these villas in years will only remain nostalgic.
The house is really a place you have to go, away from the hustle and bustle of the center, but as if living in the midst of history, can walk everywhere but still ensure the absolute quiet. we have a luggage storage. in case you need to drop off your luggage, just text us for helping

Guest access
Guests can access to everything provided in the house
This is a fully furnished 3 bedrooms house
- Check in 2pm , check out 11am.
-Complimentary tea and coffee with set of cup tea and boiler inside the room
- Steam irons for clothes
-Fully furnished bathroom with Hot water
-The kitchen with beautiful bowls and chopsticks are provided
-Water heater and set of clean towels
-The private house with a 2 queen size beds, 2 single beds divided into 4 bedrooms
- Air-conditioners are also provided to almost every room
- Don't forget to bring the key to the alley’s gate cause it will be locked around 10.pm everyday ( Just in case you decide to go out after 10 pm)
-The dining room & kitchen to arrange the guests favorite foods and drinks.
- Free WIFI 24/7
-Free location map and bus guide
-Free fresh drinking water
-A sport touring bike is available at the weekends, (normally free, but let me check my schedule)

Other things to note
- We don't allow extra guests staying overnight unless you notice me in advance and extra charge is applied
- Normally you dont need to bring any key. But if you decide to go out after 10pm, please keep in mind that you need to bring our key set for the alley’s gate cause it will be locked around 10.pm everyday

Our pick-up service: we provide pick-up service from and to the Airport which is cost only $15 instead of $17 per car ( 4 seats) as the Airport service. In addition, my driver know the place already so you dont need to find the place yourself. If you choose this, let me know soon for better arrangement.
-Or you can take the Bus number 86 for only 1,5$ per person going directly toward the city centre (Hoan Kiem Lake) and then take a small taxi for 1$ to the house location. Bus number 86 provides free wifi on bus.
- (If you have a late Check-in after 9PM, please let me know because I need to give you the clearly instruction to get the alley gate key)

The space

listing_name: Hearty Hanoi Homestay - Cozy Single Bedroom
description:
We are delighted to welcome you to our home, where the authentic Hanoian lifestyle meets thoughtful, refined homestay. You’ll be living in a local's house and stepping into their world, without compromising the comfort and convenience you’re accustomed to.

Our house is located deep inside the backstreets of a neighborhood. You need to follow a check-in guide with photos to get to our house. As a traditional house, there is no elevator, if you have heavy luggages, please consider.

The space
WHY STAY WITH US?

GREAT LOCATION: within walking distance to many attractions:
- Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, Ho Chi Minh Museum: 8-10 minutes
- Imperial Citadel of Thang Long, Military History Museum: 5 minutes
- Hoan Kiem Lake (Center Post Office; Trang Tien Plaza; Hanoi Opera House; Water Puppet Theater; St Joseph's Cathedral and Old Quarter): 15 minutes walk
- Hoa Lo Prison: 12 minutes walk
- Food Street (Tong Duy Tan street) and Hanoi Railway Street (Tran Phu Street): 5 minutes walk
- West Lake, Truc Bach Lake: 10 minutes (cycling)

SAFE AND CALM NEIGHBORHOOD : Our house is located in a small alley within a military residential area, offering a calm and quiet atmosphere. With the Ministry of Defence, various embassies, and government buildings nearby, it is also one of the safest areas in Hanoi.

COMFORTABLE AND HIGH STANDARD ROOM
- All furniture in the room is new
- Top quality bedsheet and towels: 100% cotton, ultra soft.
- Everything is cleaned to high standards - bedsheets and towels are washed at 60°C, and all furniture surfaces and floors are sanitized with detergent.
- Comfortable single bed (120x200x25 cm) with independent pocket spring mattress and memory foam layer, ensure to provide you the most comfortable and high quality sleep.
- Cozy room (10m2) with fully equipped utilities: air-conditioner; fan; hair dryer; hangers; clean towels; reading lamp.
- Openable window with decorative plants outside
- Private bathroom on the same floor. Please note the bathroom is outside and adjacent to the room, accessed through the hallway.

CONVENIENT ACCESS to:
- Park (Lenin park)
- Convenient store (Circle K; VinMart);
- Bank and ATM post (Dien Bien Phu street);
- Hospital (Saith Paul Hospital; 108 Military Hospital; Viet Duc Hospital);
- Great local street food shops (Tong Duy Tan, Hang Bong street..)
- Local market: 5 mins walk to Tran Phu street.

We also offer water bottle, water refill station, coffee, tea in the shared kitchen on the ground floor.

For your convenience, both check-in and check-out will be self-service.

Thank you for reading and we hope we can host you during your stay in Hanoi :)

Guest access
- Shared kitchen on ground floor.
- Shared laundry area on 4th floor.

During your stay
Please feel free to reach out to us by phone, text, or message for any requests you may have – we are just one message away and will do our best to assist you however we can!

Other things to note
** Since my brother and I (the fluent English speakers in the family) are currently abroad, my mom will be your primary host for most of the year. She will be there if assistance is needed. While her English is limited, she is a gracious and friendly person who genuinely loves helping others and enjoys sharing Vietnamese culture.

Please note that you need to climb the stairs as the room is on 1st floor of a 4-storey house. Think of it as a little extra adventure before settling into your comfortable space! :)

And if it’s not too much of a trouble, we kindly request you to remove your shoes before heading upstairs and throughout the rest of the house, as it's important in Vietnamese culture to wear barefoot inside the house. You are welcome to put your shoes on the shoes rack on the ground floor.

While we do ensure that you have the most comfortable stay with basic amenities, we also aim for sustainability and responsible consumption. We would be grateful if you could support us in these efforts. **

description:
My house with 3 bed rooms for guests that are very suitable for couples, business travelers, solo adventures especially girls who looking for a safety home sweet home.

The 4th floor is the terrace and laundry room

listing_name: Big Studio| Old Quarter|Train Street|Daily Service
description:
Modern open plan super spacious apartment in historic Old Quarter . Panoramic view from the ROOFTOP GARDEN will give you the best views of City and full view of majestic Old Quarter. Hoan Kiem Lake, Coffee shops, museums, sightseeing within walking distance. Separate scullery/ laundry & full open plan kitchen. Private elevator and indoor parking included. Best Airbnb apartment in Hanoi Old Quarter!

The space
IF YOU ARE INTERESTED IN THIS APARTMENT BUT IT'S NOT AVAILABLE ON YOUR BOOKING DAYS. PLEASE CLICK ON MY PROFILE TO HAVE A LOOK AT OUR OTHER SAME APARTMENTS IN THE SAME BUILDING, JUST DIFFERENT FLOOR.

The ROOFTOP GARDEN is common area on the top floor of the building and not attached to the apartments.

Our building overlooks The Old Quarter. It is modern and comfortable and centrally located. A big sofa and kingsize bed next to the balcony are the ideal spots to relax after a day city viewing with a glass of wine. The apartment has all you need from heating, modern appliances, washing machine and dryer.

The apartment is spacious and comfortable with all the necessities for visitors. It has a fully equipped kitchen, bathroom and laundry room (dryer and washer).

The apartment is located on one of the most expensive and security street. There are Police Station and Army Department at both ends of the street so you will be staying in a safest area in Hanoi.

Public Transport and taxi's at your doorstep with easy access to the Hoan Kiem Lake, Night Market, and the Airport. There are some convinience stores and supermarkets near the apartment.

description:
This cozy, clean and spacious studio is 30m2 with 01 bedroom, 01 small kitchen, 01 laptop work space, and 01 attached private bathroom, located in a small alley, only 50m to the main road. It boasts 02 big windows so the rooms are most naturally bright and airy. The studio is an ideal choice for groups of 1 – 2 people. It is in a central location with local neighborhood, very close to big lakes, parks, bus stops, supermarkets, restaurants…, and especially just 3km from Hanoi’s Old Quarter.

The space
The family friendly studio is on 3rd floor, fully-equipped (with air conditioner, queen bed with comfortable spring mattress, cable flat-screen TV, refrigerator, microwave oven, coffee maker, toaster, electric single stove top, electric kettle, kitchenware, hair dryer, iron, ironing board, shared washing machine, shared clothes dryer, free high speed wifi...) and furnished with a beautiful and cozy design.
The house features: Ground Floor: motorbike parking, shared washing machine and clothing dryer. Second to fifth floor: each floor has 01 private apartment and 01 private studio. Rooftop: orchids + flower pots + small vegetable boxes + aquariums + chairs + tables.

Guest access
The studio is easily accessed through a front door, to an open courtyard with pretty flower pots, motorbike storage room, and then staircase to the room. You are provided with private keys to front door, motorbike + shared washing machine + shared clothes dryer room, and private studio so that you can get in or get out on your own. Common access to courtyard, and rooftop (with orchids + flower pots + small vegetable boxes + aquariums + chairs + tables) to which you are able to access.

Other things to note
1. Chez Tram Homestay is a Homestay, not a hotel. That's why we cannot always match the standards of a hotel (for example we don't provide free daily room cleaning service, 24h/24h front desk, breakfasts, bottled water...). However, we always do our best to help you during your stay so that you will enjoy your stay at Chez Tram Homestay.

2. There is not any lift in the building. There are 02 stairs in the house: 01 private stairs for my family and 01 private stairs for guests.

3. My family lives in the ground floor of the building. So if you need any assistance, my family member (my parents, my brother, my sister or my daughter) is ready to help you with big smiles.

4. We will provide you with private keys to entrance door, motorbike + shared washing machine + shared clothes dryer room, and private apartment so that you can get in or get out on your own.

5. Bottles of water, breakfasts and other meals are excluded from the room rate. If you need us to provide room cleaning service, the rate is 10 USD/time of 02 hours maximum.

6. Free daily room cleaning service is not provided. If you need to clean your room by yourself, vacuum and cleaning mop are available at ground floor. If you need us to clean your room, the room cleaning rate is 10 USD/time of 02 hours maximum.

listing_name: Elegant green space with minimalist style
description:
Tucked away in Hanoi’s French Quarter, this 82m² apartment offers an elegant blend of greenery and minimalist design. Inspired by Japanese aesthetics, the space flows gently from room to room, filled with natural light, soft textures, and calming tones. A spacious balcony with lush plants invites slow mornings and peaceful evenings. Every detail is intentional — a quiet retreat in the city.

The space
The layout flows openly: kitchen, dining, and living areas connect seamlessly in one continuous space, opening out to treetops — a rare and calming view in Hanoi’s Old Quarter.

Hints of Japanese design run throughout: from the soft lines of the shoji-style bedroom doors to the asanoha motif, echoed in the balcony railing and the carefully hand-cut floor tiles. Light filters through the rolling blinds at certain hours, casting delicate asanoha shadows that shift gently throughout the day.

Warm-toned wood features in built-in shelves, window frames, and quiet accents across the home — adding a soft, grounding presence to the clean layout.

The main bedroom opens onto a wide balcony filled with potted greenery — a space where you can enjoy morning coffee, read, or simply sit back and take in the quiet rustling of leaves. It’s a rare corner of stillness right in the heart of the Old Quarter.

There’s also a coffee machine in the kitchen, inviting you to ease into the day at your own pace. This is a place for rest, reflection, and the quiet comfort of thoughtful design.

Guest access
Guests will be able to access most entire of the apartment.

Other things to note
1. We request a photo of your passport when you check in the apartment just for safety reason and it will be used to register to the area authority for your staying. No other purposes.

2. Situated on a scenic, tree-lined street, our bright and airy apartment features two facades. While soundproof glass is installed, occasional loud noises may still occur. Guests sensitive to noise should consider this before booking. For your comfort, complimentary earplugs are provided in the apartment if needed.

3. The Apt's entrance will be closed at 10 pm but you will have your own key to get in any time during your stay. Please do not forget to bring the key when you go out at night.

4. For Trash, turn right at the entrance of the apartment, then turn right again at the corner of Tong Dan St. and Le Phung Hieu St., you will see big public trash bin about 30m away on the right side of Le Phung Hieu St..

5. We have security camera in front of main door to the apt for your safety.

6. No slipper in the wooden floor.

7. To turn on/off electric water heater, use the electricity board next to the main door

8. The orange swift on the entrance to living room is for both Ceiling Fan and Light. Use remote to turn on/off the ceiling fan.

9. Please keep the boost pump in ON mode (the orange swift in the WC). They will help you have strong water when using.

10. Do not change or move the arrangement of the furniture inside the apartment. We have a small altar, please do not move anything on this.

11. All electricity in the house is 220V, EXCEPT toaster and electric kettle is 110V (is highlighted in orange), please note this to avoid using the wrong socket for other electric equipments.

12. There is a place for parking motorbike at the next door building (2C Le Phung Hieu Apartment)

BROWN is a perfect base to explore all parts of the city, just 1 min walk to Hoan Kiem Lake, 1 min walk to Night Market and 1 min walk to the famous Ta Hien street.

• Check-out: Before 12:00 PM

“Thiếc” mean “tin”. Hàng Thiếc Street is one of 36 traditional trade streets. At our house, you are staying in the heart of the old quarter. And now it’s famous for the dish “ngan cháy tỏi- deep fried goose with garlic “

From there, you only take 5 minutes walk to Hoàn Kiếm Lake, St. Joseph Church, 🌃 night market, weekend walking area, less than 10 mins to Vietnamese Woman’s Museum, Hoa Lo Prison, or The Temple of Literature...

Outside of the house is tons of street food and service: convenience store, nail 💅, spa, hair salon, fresh juice🍹🥤, souvenir shops, clothing boutiques ...
Just walk out, you can easily find food stall even daytime or in the evening.

Even though located in the noisest street of the Old Quarter, the house is very quiet. Don’t worries about the noise will disturb you. The house stays in small alley, the feature of Hanoi’s old city, stays 10 metres away from the front street. Moreover, H&G is in citizen area, have 2 layer locked doors (1 lane gate, 1 main door) and CCTV forward to the main door . Neighbors are very friendly.

H&G used to be 2 separated apartments in small alley, so you will have spacious entire house 🏠🏡🏘️.

First floor of house is for entrance and bathroom, second floor includes kitchen and spacious bedroom. We don't have lift, it has stairs in the house.

We have:
•1 king bed 🛏️
•2 single beds 🛏️,
• Android TV
. Heat and cold air conditioner
•High speed Wi-fi
•Garden view
•Space for children playground, many stuffed animals with blankets inside.
. Free cold water in the fridge .
. Fairy decorating light .

A balcony with plenty of plants provides fresh air and keeps the kitchen ventilated🍃🌱🌳🌿☘️🍀. Even you can feel like the fairy garden shining in the evening 🔆 🌃 .

Kitchen is fully stocked with everything you need to cook even the large meal for your family or small party.
Come with:
•Plenty of pots/pans/platters
•Serving utensil for both Asian and Western style meal 🥢🍴🥄🥛
•Tongs and set of knives.
•A huge fridge 🚪, induction hob with oven, microwave, cooker.

For the bathroom, we hope you can enjoy the most relax time🚿🚽🧻.

We also have washing machine and dryer inside the house🧺. You can freely use them.

We hope that you can feel the most comfortable in our place :)

Guest access
LIVE AS LOCAL - SELF CHECK IN - FREE LAUNDRY - COZY HOUSE

Please read carefully all our descriptions of the house.

The feature of Hanoi is small alleys, our house is on one of them.

Morever, H&G were 2 separated apartments, so you can access the house by 2 ways: 1 through main door and 1 through the balcony.

Noted that we have 2 floors and stairs is inside the house.

However remember to lock door when you sleep or going out.

Please note that our house do not provide shampoo, conditioner, shower gel, soap or laundry detergent, ... and clothing hanging area is the open area

From the airport, you can take bus 86 (45.000vnd/person) or airport mini bus (50.000vnd/person) or take a taxi (~400.000/ride).
Public transportation only available from 6 a.m to 9 p.m

For bus 86, you can stop at 162 Tran Quang Khai and walk ~15 mins

For Airport mini bus, you can stop at final stop, No 1, Quang Trung Street and take ~10 mins to our house.

Other things to note
H&G is in citizen’s area, we share alley space with others. Remember to keep surround clean, do not make too much noise and lock alley gate after 10 pm.

To prevent any pest or insects from outside to the house, please always keep the net door closed. We also have insects repellent looks like candy in the house, please do not touch or throw them away, just leave them there.

Following Vietnamese law, we need the pictures of your passport and visa to register with government. We guarantee that only for security system.

Check our guidebook to find some suggestions to explore Hanoi truly. Live as local!

listing_name: Tran’s Home | Lovely Balcony • Old Qtr • Elevator
description:
Serenity, nostalgia and cleanliness are the first things that you can recognize immediately when you come to our place. Located in the old quarter, The house is designed with minimalism architecture which would bring a sense of comfort and convenience to anyone staying here. The house is in one of the oldest lanes in Hanoi and has been an indispensable part of my family for over 60 years. You can have a panoramic view to many French colonial architectural buildings and Vietnamese housing style.

The space
1. LOCATION AND SPACE:
Located in one of the most tranquil and time-honored lanes in Hanoi, Trần Home is an ideal, private place in the middle of the city that keeps you away from all of the workaday worries. The room is on the 4th floor and has been newly renovated yet in the building was built a long time ago. The neighborhood brings you an old Hanoi trace, nostalgic atmosphere with a view to a French colonial architectural building.
Additionally, because the house is on a pedestrian food street, you can access easily to a series of restaurants, convenient stores, bars and clubs.
You will like the minimalist design of the room with mainly black and white, bringing along a sense of cleanliness. We have all the things that you may require: queen size bed, extra bed, hygienic bathroom, strong Wifi electronic devices like AC, mini-fridge, smart TV (With Netflix streaming service),... The house has a wide and lovely rooftop. This is where you can enjoy sunlight with a cup of coffe in the daytime or cool breeze with a bottle of beer when the night falls.
2. LIVE LIKE LOCALS:
Staying with us you will learn how to live like a real Vietnamese. Surrounded by friendly neighbors, with a lot of sidewalk eateries just outside the lane, you will be taken care from head to toe, from a perfect sleeping time to a pleasant experience.
3. EASY ACCESS TO ANY PLACES:
We are on the most famous and traditional Vietnamese street food of Hanoi!
In addition, every weekend nights, our street will transform into Walking food/entertainment street.
* 10 steps to Bach Ma temple - Vietnamese traditional live music on the street perform by Children.
* 1 mins to Bia Hoi street - Modern live Music on the street
* 1 mins to Ma May street - \ Chau Van\"- a traditional folk art of northern Vietnam
* 3 mins to the Night market

listing_name: The Balcony Apartment - View  Hanoi Old Quater
description:
The best location to experience local life in Hanoi:
- Right Center of Hanoi Old Quarter
- Great street view studio on the 2nd floor with 2 balconies
- Only 2-10min walk to famous attractions
- Many street restaurants nearby to discover Hanoi famous foods
- Experience local morning market (3-5am)
- Friendly, supportive, responsive, Chinese, JPese speaking hosts who studied in the US, JP & China.
- I’m running 2 airbnb apartments very nice. Click my picture to see and choose for your trip.

The space
If you love to experience the dynamic, hustle & bustle life in right center of Old Quarter, you will love our house like ourselves and many other our guests do.
———
Dear our lovely guests,

We are 3A sisters (Van Anh, Lan Anh, Hoang Anh) who loves traveling, having a good taste in fashion, cuisine and lifestyle. We used to study Culture, Linguistic, Marketing in Japan, China and the US. We can speak fluently in English, good at Japanese, and Chinese. We have traveled to more than 30 countries around the world, and I bet we have been in your country.

With traveling experiences, knowing how amazing the homestay is, we decided to share our sweet house with you - travelers around the world, to help you have the best experiences, and memories during your visit to Hanoi.

This is a Loft studio with 2 flowery balconies on the 2nd floor that gives you a great street view.

We had been spending more than 20 years of childhood and teenage time in this cozy house. This house witnessed how we were born, how we grew up happily with full of sweet memories.

Locating right in the center of old quarter, the center of Hanoi, just a short walk to Hoan Kiem Lake, this house is a great and the best choice for your accommodation during your visit to Hanoi, that allows you to easily explore all aspects of our city, from sightseeing, history, culture, local life to cuisine. Most of the must-to-visit places, must-to-try foods and must-to-experience activities are just nearby our house. We believe you cannot find anywhere more convenient than this sweet house.

Welcome to Hanoi, to Old Quarter and our loft studio.
From 3A sister with Best Regards!!!

———-////———

It is very easy, convenient for you to visit Hanoi tourism spots as following:
+ 2 minutes walk to Dong Xuan Market
+ 1 minute walk to O Quan Chuong / Hang Ma Street / Night Market
+ 2 - 5 minutes walk to Hanoi Old Quater streets/ Ta Hien Street
+ 5 minutes walk to Long Bien bridge, one of symbols of Hanoi that was designed by a famous designer who designed the Effel tower in Paris.
+ 10 minutes walk to Hoan Kiem Lake

If you are Hanoi cuisine fan, you will easily find any foods you love at Old Street Food Alley (named Ngõ Hàng Chiếu - at 80 Hang Chieu street) just 1 min walk away from my house.

And do not forget to experience the morning market from 3 to 5 a.m everyday right at the corner of street which is very special that you hardly find at the other places.

Guest access
You are welcomed to access:
- Two balconies
- Living room
- Kitchen & Eating area
- Bathroom
- The loft

Other things to note
- Check-in time : 2pm - 10pm (Early check-in with no charge if available)
- Check-out time : Before 11am (Late check-out with small charge if available)
