listing_name: Apartment w Balcony | 2 Beds | Old Quarter
description:
Located on one of the most expensive and central neighborhoods in Hanoi along with a balcony looking out to the crowded streets, our apartment, which is exceptionally designed with a perfect balance of both classic and modern elements, has everything to offer for your stay. Again, as it lies within the heart of Hanoi, it is very close to local food stalls, supermarkets, convenience stores, and most importantly famous tourist attractions. This will be the best place you have ever experienced!

The space
The apartment has installed wide windows opening out to a balcony with a lovely coffee table for you to enjoy a cup of coffee/tea every morning while looking out to the streets and sniffing the fresh air from the houseplants. There are two queen beds and one big sofa which can accommodate up to 6 adults. All bedroom necessities including best quality pillow and blanket are fully provided. There is also a washing machine and a clothes hanging corner full of sunshine for you to use. Anyone who enjoys cooking can also cook their partner a lovely meal with our fully supplied kitchen appliances. Through our service, you will experience all the best of Hanoi while still enjoying the quietness inside the apartment.

Other things to note
How to get to “ Home Sweet Home “ ?
- From the Airport :
1. By Taxi : Only $17 from Noi Bai Airport to our lovely place.
2. By Airport Shuttle Bus:
Take Bus 86 – right in front Noi Bai International Airport to Hanoi Railway Station. USD$ 1.5/ per ticket/ per person.
- From Hanoi railway station, it only takes you roughly 10 minutes to walk straight to our flat. . Otherwise, you can catch an Uber or a cab and pay around $1 to $2 (However, please note that taxi drivers may deny taking you there as the trip is too short).

listing_name: Hearty Hanoi Homestay-Double Bedroom with Balcony
description:
We are delighted to welcome you to our home, where the authentic Hanoian lifestyle meets thoughtful, refined homestay. You’ll be living in a local's house and dwelling into their world, without compromising the comfort and convenience you’re accustomed to.

Our house is located deep inside the backstreets of a neighborhood. You need to follow a check-in guide with photos to get to our house. As a traditional house, there is no elevator, if you have heavy luggages, please consider.

The space
WHY STAY WITH US?

GREAT LOCATION: within walking distance to many attractions:
- Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, One Pillar Pagoda, Ho Chi Minh Museum: 8-10 minutes
- Imperial Citadel of Thang Long, Military History Museum: 5 minutes
- Hoan Kiem Lake (Center Post Office; Trang Tien Plaza; Hanoi Opera House; Water Puppet Theater; St Joseph's Cathedral and Old Quarter): 15 minutes walk
- Hoa Lo Prison: 12 minutes walk
- Food Street (Tong Duy Tan street) and Hanoi Railway Street (Tran Phu Street): 5 minutes walk
- West Lake, Truc Bach Lake: 10 minutes (cycling)

SAFE AND CALM NEIGHBORHOOD : Our house is located in a small alley within a military residential area, offering a calm and quiet atmosphere. With the Ministry of Defence, various embassies, and government buildings nearby, it is also one of the safest areas in Hanoi.

COMFORTABLE AND HIGH STANDARD ROOM
- All furniture in the room is new
- Top quality bedsheet and towels: 100% cotton, ultra soft.
- Everything is cleaned to high standards - bedsheets and towels are washed at 60°C, and all furniture surfaces and floors are sanitized with detergent.
- Comfortable double bed (150x200x28cm) with independent pocket spring mattress and memory foam layer, ensure to provide you the most comfortable and high quality sleep.
- Cozy room (13m2) with fully equipped utilities: air-conditioner; fan; hair dryer; hangers; clean towels; reading lamp; cotton stick; tissue; notebook and pens.
- Small balcony with plants outside
- Shared bathroom on the same floor if there is guest on the other room across the hallway - otherwise, private. Please note the bathroom is outside the room and is accessed through the hallway.

CONVENIENT ACCESS to:
- Park (Lenin park)
- Convenient store (Circle K; VinMart);
- Bank and ATM post (Dien Bien Phu street);
- Hospital (Saith Paul Hospital; 108 Military Hospital; Viet Duc Hospital);
- Great local street food shops (Tong Duy Tan, Hang Bong street..)
- Local market: 5 mins walk to Tran Phu street.

We also offer water bottle, water refill station, coffee, tea in the shared kitchen on the ground floor.

For your convenience, both check-in and check-out will be self-service.

Thank you for reading and we hope we can host you during your stay in Hanoi :)

Guest access
- Shared kitchen on ground floor.
- Shared laundry area on 4th floor (The washing machine also has the drying function).

During your stay
Please feel free to reach out to us by phone, text, or message for any requests you may have – we are just one message away and will do our best to assist you however we can!

Other things to note
** Since my brother and I (the fluent English speakers in the family) are currently abroad, my mom will be your primary host for most of the year. She will be there if assistance is needed. While her English is limited, she is a gracious and friendly person who genuinely loves helping others and enjoys sharing Vietnamese culture.

Please note that you need to climb the stairs as the room is on 3rd floor of a 4-storey house. Think of it as a little extra adventure before settling into your comfortable space! :)

And if it’s not too much of a trouble, we kindly request you to remove your shoes before heading upstairs and throughout the rest of the house, as it's important in Vietnamese culture to wear barefoot inside the house. You are welcome to put your shoes on the shoes rack on the ground floor.

While we do ensure that you have the most comfortable stay with basic amenities, we also aim for sustainability and responsible consumption. We would be grateful if you could support us in these efforts. **

listing_name: BUDGET & COSY ✯ LAKESIDE ✯ CENTRAL HANOI STUDIO
description:
+ If you ask any Hanoi-holic, you will heard them reveal that the most ideal place to stay in Hanoi is anywhere nearby Ho Tay ( West Lake) - Truc Bach is one of the ones. The place is like an island right inside the center of city, the air is perfect, the traffic is not overloaded like other places. There are a lot of restaurants, bars, cafes,...surrounded.

Are u finding a place where you can hide from all the noise of the city but is still in the real heart of Hanoi ? - Here we are :D

The space
+ The whole lovely studio apartments will all belong to you during your staying. You can find anything you need just like when you are at home: flat-screen TV, Sofa, housewares, dinning table, desk, bookself, a king-size bed...

+The building has a big terrace on the 9th floor ,10th floor and 11th floor. From here you can see a beautiful view of Truc Bach Lake, West Lake and the city. Perfect for chilling after a long day in Hanoi.

+We also have cleaning service 1 - 2 time/week to make sure that the place is always in the best condition for you.

+The location itself's safe already but the security of the apartment is still set 24/7 so your totally safe during your staying here.

Guest access
+A confined garage for motorbikes

+The main hall where guests can easily check in with the doorman or rest for a while, providing free water

+ Big terrace on the 9th floor ,10th floor and 11th floor with lake view for guests to chill

Other things to note
+You will find in the apartment all necessary utilities and daily life goods such as kitchen equipment, cooking tools, toilet paper, towels ,etc... We recommend that you should bring your own personal toiletries like toothbrush, toothpaste, shampoo… However, if you accidently forget them - don't worry - we would be willing to offer you some :)

+We also gladly to provide laundry service for guest with only 50.000 VND extra/ kilogram. If you're staying for one week or longer, you can use the wash maschine for free.

+ Transfer service from the airport to An Nguyen Building and return is also available . Our driver will wait for you at your arrival gate, holding your name. If you want to book the service just let us know :D

+ We have motorbike for rent : 200.000vnd/day - perfect to explore Hanoi ;)

+ If it's your special day, we can help you make it even more special with our balloons and rose petals decoration with only $20 extra fee. Please book this service 2 days in advance.

+ Someone previous guests once complained that the apartment doesn't have a lake view as in the photo. You can just enjoy the lake view from the top floors of the building (9,10,11th floor). Please don't misunderstand that the apartment has lake view (I've also noted this below each photos.)

listing_name: Tran’s Home | Comfy 1BR & Living Room w/Bed • Lift
description:
Serenity, nostalgia and cleanliness are the first things that you can recognize immediately when you come to our place. Located in the old quarter, The house is designed with minimalism architecture which would bring a sense of comfort and convenience to anyone staying here. The house is in one of the oldest lanes in Hanoi and has been an indispensable part of my family for over 60 years. You can have a panoramic view to many French colonial architectural buildings and Vietnamese housing style.

The space
1. LOCATION AND SPACE:
Located in one of the most tranquil and time-honored lanes in Hanoi, Trần Home is an ideal, private place in the middle of the city that keeps you away from all of the workaday worries. The room is on the 3rd floor and has been newly renovated yet in the building was built a long time ago. The neighborhood brings you an old Hanoi trace, nostalgic atmosphere with a view to a French colonial architectural building.
Additionally, because the house is on a pedestrian food street, you can access easily to a series of restaurants, convenient stores, bars and clubs.
You will like the minimalist design of the room with mainly black and white, bringing along a sense of cleanliness. As I mentioned above, we have all the things that you may require: queen size bed, extra bed, hygienic bathroom, electronic devices like AC, mini-fridge, smart TV,... There is also a small balcony and a well-equipped kitchen next to the room, where you can utilize the space to use the extra bed. This is definitely what you are looking for.
2. LIVE LIKE LOCALS:
Staying with us you will learn how to live like a real Vietnamese. Surrounded by friendly neighbors, with a lot of sidewalk eateries just outside the lane, you will be taken care from head to toe, from a perfect sleeping time to a pleasant experience.
3. EASY ACCESS TO ANY PLACES:
We are on the most famous and traditional Vietnamese street food of Hanoi!
In addition, every weekend nights, our street will transform into Walking food/entertainment street.
* 10 steps to Bach Ma temple - Vietnamese traditional live music on the street perform by Children.
* 1 mins to Bia Hoi street - Modern live Music on the street
* 1 mins to Ma May street - \ Chau Van\"- a traditional folk art of northern Vietnam
* 3 mins to the Night market

Within walking distance

listing_name: Luxury Apt/Rose Boutique/Central Hoan Kiem/Vincom
description:
The apartment with Indochine styles and located right in the heart of Hanoi, close to Train Street, Vincom Ba Trieu Central , West Lake and Hanoi Old Quarter,.. It is easy to discover Ha Noi by walking,riding a bike or motorbike.Around the building have many restaurant from Asian to Europe,Viet Nam local street food
p/s:please be consider,there is a construction in the week day, we will try best to keep it down. More apartments are available nearby — contact me for the best option for your stay

The space
The furniture and design are to give you the feeling of warmth and comfort as you are at home. In addition, the furniture in the apartment is very full and convenient, making you it easy to use as well as search in the apartment. The 9th floor apartment have a view overlooking the back of the building and will be very cool because it is on the high floors.

The apartment has cozy space with an average size of about 60m2. The apartment was designed by Ms.Dung, a talented woman who specializes in designing apartments for many large buildings in Hanoi with a modern architecture combined with a bit of classic look, and will definitely make you feel warm and comfortable. Of course, i want you to feel like home, so you can find almost any basic facilities in apartment ranging from a modern kitchen equipped with exhaust hood, a dry and clean bathroom with lovely decoration, etc. Also fully utilise the available space to combine together a bedroom and living room, furnished with soft sofa.

When renting my apartment you will feel like you are in a large hotel because I equip my apartment with 19-liter Lavie water bottles. Tea and coffee are available on the table or in the kitchen cupboard. Paper towels are always placed on the dining table and there are the best towels , face towels in the bathroom for you. In addition, I have a team to clean rooms for guests on request.

There are many restaurant and shopping venues around the building. Near the building next to Thien Quang lake is a coffee shop that can see the panorama to the lake when you are on the floor of the coffee shop. Especially around the building you can easily find a European restaurant or Vietnamese restaurant. There is a large park near the building called Thong Nhat Park, just 10 minutes from the building to the park, in the morning you can breathe fresh air and have many playgrounds in that area.

Guest access
You can access all functions / facilities / appliances in the apartment during your stay.
In addition to the first floor of the building there is a gym room and a laundry room you can use them each days.

Apartments have security guards to monitor and protect everything outside 24/24. The guard will have the responsibility to take you to the apartment and give you the key. Check-in time is after 2 pm and check-out time is 12 pm. There will be reception in the lobby during the day.

Other things to note
- Please wait at least 10 mins to make sure there is enough hot water for you. And turn off when using to avoid any accidents happen.
- No smoking allowed inside apartment. Party and loud music is also not allowed in our house.
- Kindly treat my property with respect during your stay and do not cause any major or superficial damages.

A 60 square meter - entire Apartment with 4 king beds , 1 sofa bed and 1 extra bed , very nearby Hoan Kiem Lake . Nestled within the Old Quarter on Cau Go Street, it can't get any more better than this

Our Apartment located in Cau Go street - a one-way street, only a few steps to Hoan Kiem Lake and almost must-visit attractions. When you stay in the Old Quarter, everything will be around: restaurants, shops, cafe, even the laundry, convenient stores.

- Few steps to Hoan Kiem Lake

- 4 mins walk to Ta Hien beer street
- 1 mins walk to Water Puppet Theater

By bus: you can take the bus number 86 from the airport to the city center, it will take about 45 minutes. Bus running hour is from 6:20 AM to 11 PM every day. Bus fee is $2

By taxi: If your arrival time is not on the bus running time or you want to transfer directly to our house you can book a taxi or Grab car.

listing_name: Hanoi-hearted Home Beyond House # Rose
description:
Home Beyond House is a new 5-storey-townhouse in the middle of Ngoc Ha village, reputable flowers farming center of the old days in Hanoi. The hosts are living next-door, reserving for guests the entire house with 8 bed-rooms named after the village's 8 signature types of flowers. Rose Room is located in level 2 where the guests share a bathroom with those staying in Peony Room. The common spaces also include a living room and a kitchen in level 1 plus a garden on the roof.

The space
Literally located at the heart of the busy city of Hanoi, Ngoc Ha village remains somehow islanded in a pleasant way to make sure Home Beyond House dwellers could enjoy the quiet, peaceful yet friendly atmosphere while still having the privilege to stay close to almost all the attraction places of the area, i.e. Hochiminh museum 500 m away, B-52 Lake 300 m away, West Lake 1 km away, Botanical Garden 1 km away, Literature Temple 2.5 km away and the Old Quarter 3 km away.
The house is decorated with unique oriental theme, furnished with occidental standards and topped (both physically and virtually) with a spacious garden offering beautiful city view on the roof.

Guest access
Any guest, once holding the key to the room, may at any time go up to Level 6 to spend some leisure time in the garden or use the lounge, kitchen and dining table in Level 1

During your stay
The hosting family is actually living in the house next door sharing the roof-top garden with Home Beyond House. Guests are welcome to ring the bell anytime from 8:30 to 22:00.

listing_name: BrightBalconyStudio-HeartofOldQuarter-Checkin24/7
description:
GREY is a cozy 25m² studio in the heart of Hanoi Old Quarter, just 1 min walk to Hoan Kiem Lake and Ta Hien Street. Located on the 2nd floor, it features a private balcony with vibrant street views.

Perfect for solo travelers or couples traveling light who want to stay right in the center of everything.

Note: Due to the central location, it can be noisy, especially on weekend nights before midnight. If you’re a light sleeper or sensitive to noise, this might not be the best fit for your stay.

The space
We have 3 seperate apartments in the house, in which GREY is on the 2nd floor (no elevator), one side facing the street with a lovely private balcony; the other side facing a shared greeny patio.

We provide you a well furnished and minimalist apartment with everything you need for a pleasant stay.

Our Airbnb is in walking distance to many restaurants and local street foods (Phở, Bún Chả - chargrilled pork w/ vermicelli ect), pubs and clubs, beer street (Ta Hien street), coffee shops, 24/7 convenient stores, super-market, famous Hang Be street market , night market etc... Police office, pharmacy and banks, ATMs, washing and drying services... It's simply in the middle of everything.

Guest access
1. Everything provided inside the GREY including:
- 1 queen-size bed (160cmx200cm) topped with soft toppers and cotton linens.
- 2-seater sofa
- Fast wifi
- Samsung smart TV with internet access.
- Electrolux 90L fridge
- Electric kettle
- Napkins
- Bathroom with a walk in shower
- Clean towels
- Toilet papers
- Shampoo, shower gels, hand washing
- Hairdryer
- Medical Kit Box
- Kitchen area with Electrolux induction hob, pots and pans, dishes, mixing bowl, bowls, silverware etc
- Electrolux microwave
- Air-condition
- Private and lovely balcony with street-view

2. Outside the apartment:
- A shared greeny patio on the same floor (this kind of greeny space is priceless in cramped Old Street Quarter)
- Washing machine and drying machine (on the 3rd floor with a fee)

3. We hope you will find comfort in our house and take care of it as your own place.

Other things to note
Check-in & Check-out
• Check-in: After 3:00 PM
• Check-out: Before 12:00 PM
Self check-in/check-out only, as we don’t live on-site.

Luggage Storage
• You may leave your luggage in the shared area on the 2nd floor before check-in or after check-out. Please inform us in advance for instructions.

Legal ID Requirement
• We are required by law to register all foreign and Vietnamese guests. Please send us a clear photo/PDF of your group’s passports/IDs and valid Vietnam visas via Airbnb or email before check-in. Your information will be kept confidential. If you have any concerns, feel free to ask. Without these details, we are not permitted to host your stay.

Visitor Policy
• Only registered guests listed on the reservation are allowed inside the property.
Visitors or additional guests are not permitted without prior notice and host approval, due to local registration requirements.

Cleaning & Towels
• We do not offer daily cleaning or towel changes. Cleaning is done only after check-out.

Airport Transfer Service
• We offer pick-up/drop-off to Noi Bai Airport for $18/way (4-seater car). Please request in advance for smooth coordination.

listing_name: Home in Old Quarter/Balcony/City View/Lift
description:
Mia's Home is a 25m2 studio on a building in the heart of Hanoi Old Quarter. It has a panoramic window with a big balcony, looking out to the most wonderful view of the town, packed with colonist buildings, from which Hanoi Old Quarter was given the nickname of 'little Paris'. Watching the real life of locals from my balcony with a cup of tea or coffee will surely be a nice experience to try.

The space
Our place's Pros and Cons:

Pros: - Our place is right in the middle of the Old Quarter, which is the most attractive part of the city. Tourist attractions are within walking distance. Best local food praised by international media is all around. We mention those in detail in our guide book.
- We are proud of a good balcony looking out to a very picturesque scene of the Old Quarter, packed with historic colonist buildings. You can also take a look at the real daily local life from above, an experience that can hardly be found anywhere else in Hanoi.
Cons: - The name \Old Quarter\" may already suggest our place's disadvantage. Houses in the Old Quarter were built long ago

listing_name: Ap A3
description:
The building is with modern design, offering serviced apartments for rent, long or short time. It is really central, a few steps to Lotte Center, to Vincom Metropolis , to West Lake and 10 - 15 mins to the Old Quarter.

It situates within the diplomatic compound, surrounded by beauty spots, restaurants, bars, supermarkets, and clinics etc.
The apartments are fully furnished and each has its own kitchen and bathroom.
Nice, hospitable, and responsive host family.

The space
The type of room size is 26 m2.
Private bathroom for each apartment, hot water, cooling and heating air con, Wifi Internet, Cable TV, kitchens are equipped with cooking and dining appliances.

Guest access
Motobike parking available for in-house guests

During your stay
You can go through Lane 294 - Kim Ma Street, turn right about 50 meters, you see Happy Hotel, turn right next a little more, you will find our house with number 20 (recommended).
Or you can go through Lane 290 - Kim Ma street, turn left about 50 m, you will find our house with number 20.

Other things to note
Kim Ma Street, Ba Dinh Area is located right in the busiest central business of Hanoi. You just need to go a few steps, you have reached Hanoi Old Quarter, beside the small old houses, the small alleys are a lot of different goods, trading all kinds of goods, especially is fashion clothes.
In the Old Quarter, you will enjoy unique dishes, quintessential traditions of Vietnamese cuisine and even the world, great - small eateries nestled in small alleys covered moss and ancient ..

The Ba Dinh area is also very connected with the French architectural styles that are intertwined with small villages and alleys of Hanoi, creating a unique and unique architecture in Vietnam.
Besides, there is one of Hanoi's marvels, which is the West Lake, one of the largest and most beautiful lakes in Hanoi, which is really fresh treasures on hot summer days of the Capital. Hanoi, not far away, the big Red River (Red River), strong racing makes us so excited about Hanoi's unparalleled beauty ..

listing_name: Hanoi hearted Home Beyond House # Snapdragon
description:
Home Beyond House is a new 5-storey-townhouse in the middle of Ngoc Ha village, reputable flowers farming center of the old days in Hanoi. The hosts are living next-door, reserving for guests the entire house with 8 bed-rooms named after the village's 8 signature types of flowers. Snapdragon Room is located in level 3 where the guests share a bathroom with those staying in Tuberose Room. The common spaces also include a living room and a kitchen in level 1 plus a garden on the roof.

The space
Literally located at the heart of the busy city of Hanoi, Ngoc Ha village remains somehow islanded in a pleasant way to make sure Home Beyond House dwellers could enjoy the quiet, peaceful yet friendly atmosphere while still having the privilege to stay close to almost all the attraction places of the area, i.e. Hochiminh museum 500 m away, B-52 Lake 300 m away, West Lake 1 km away, Botanical Garden 1 km away, Literature Temple 2.5 km away and the Old Quarter 3 km away.
The house is decorated with unique oriental theme, furnished with occidental standards and topped (both physically and virtually) with a spacious garden offering beautiful city view on the roof.

Guest access
Any guest, once holding the key to the room, may at any time go up to Level 6 to spend some leisure time in the garden or use the lounge, kitchen and dining table in Level 1

During your stay
The hosting family is actually living in the house next door sharing the roof-top garden with Home Beyond House. Guests are welcome to ring the bell anytime from 8:30 to 22:00.

listing_name: Silk Studio _ Willow Old Town Hanoi
description:
Welcome to Hanoi Old Quarter and welcome to Mộc (The Wood) Homestay. This is a private 4 floors house in the heart of the Old Quarter that our family just recently moved out, renovated, & turned it to Mộc Homestay - Mi casa es su casa, 03/19.
This listing is for the entire 2nd floor, Silk Studio - a 30m2 (or 320 sq. ft) of space with its own private entrance door, bathroom, and king bed.
There are 36 old streets in Hanoi Old Quarter - our house is located in the old Shoes (Hàng Giầy) street.

The space
Our family has done a lot of traveling ourselves so we understand the needs of travelers when it comes to the old town like Hanoi Old Quarter - Bukchon Hanok Village, Ruifan District, Old Quebec City, SOHO, etc...

This 2nd floor is furnished with pretty much all that you need for either a quick stay or for an extended period of time. There is a California king bed that can fit 2 adults with a small child. For extra fee ($8) we can provide a twin size bed if you would like.

The private bathroom that just got renovated has a brand new standing shower with standard European toilet and single vanity.
We will provide free high speed wifi to our guesses.
This floor has standard ceiling height 2.1m (or 6ft11).

-living room space with coffee table
-lamp for reading
-Air conditioner
-Refrigerator
-Complementary bottle waters, tea, coffee for you

Simply make yourself at home

Guest access
Entire 2nd floor
Private bathroom
Cal King size bed (1.8m x 2m)
Sedge cushion and desk
Extra twin bed for small fee (please send in request before your arrival)
Free high speed wifi

Other things to note
All the guests copy exactly this add:
9 Hàng Giầy, Hàng Buồm, Hoàn Kiếm, Hà Nội
And paste to googlemap because There are two identical street letters but different signs.
My homestay is right near the junction of Ngo Gach and Hang Giay streets

listing_name: Linnie's Abditory-In the heart of Hanoi
description:
- A hidden charming old house is used to be a part of a mellowed French colonial villa and is located in a really old street called Cua Bac, you go straight to a small lane and the old private house is there for you.
- My house is right next to “Linnie's Abditory” so if you – my lovely neighbour want things, just knock the door and I’ll be there immediately for you (but not share anything – 2 different houses).

The space
-My Phung’s family lived in Hanoi from my grand – grandparent generation and I am the fourth generation of Phung’s family who’s still live here. I am so proud to say that my family is one of the minority families who still follow and keep the traditional rules. So if you are curious about the real Hanoian’s life or just want to have a traditional dinner, please join with my family!
* Space
-Only - 7 mins to Tran Quoc Pagoda
- 5 mins to Quan Thanh Temple
- 5 mins to West Lake
- 8-10 mins to Old Quarter
- 12 mins to Hoan Kiem Lake
- 25-40 mins taxi to Noi Bai airport
-A hidden charming old house is used to be a part of a mellowed French colonial villa. The private house is petit with a high ceiling for more open space.
-The house shares the same outdoor alley with other houses but completely private entrance and space. You will have the house, private bathroom and shared a small front yard with my house!
-Amazing street food vendor you cannot miss. You will find the legendary “banh my”, “ bun cha” or “banh cuon” as well as other local traditional nourishment with arm’s search.
-You will have full access during your stay to all the following. If you need something specific, please do not hesitate to ask me.
+ One private studio equipped with A.C, fan, a queen size bed, wardrobe, hairdryer, fridge and more.
+ One separate private bathroom with proper shower, water heater, towels, shampoo and shower gel.
-Free WIFI
-Free Tea/ Coffee/Instant Noodle
•Other things to note:
-Our place has its own private entrance. However, we do share a small alley with other families in the neighbourhood. For security reason, the alley’s gate will close after 10 p.m. You will have your own key to open the gate but please remember to lock it again after you open it.
-If you need Recommendations for Tours around Hanoi or surrounding areas, please kindly let me know in advance.
-Please kindly let me know when you will arrive in Hanoi beforehand so we can perfectly plan your trip and show you the way to my house.
•Interaction with guest
- You can contact me via Airbnb or;
- You will have my telephone number when you finish your booking!

I will meet you personally upon your arrival and show you around the house. Since I have a passion for travelling, I am more than happy to hang out and listen to your tales. I can show you some secret cool places less touristy destinations to visit in Ha Noi. Late night beer or just a cup of coffee? Sign me up!

Other things to note
- The private bathroom is 1-step opposite to the house.

- Before your arrival, please kindly send your passports/ Vietnamese ID so i can register your staying with the authorities (Immigration Department) cause it’s a procedure here in Hanoi.

- No free parking but there are some parkings near the house.

- As the house is inside the neighborhood so it will have noise from neighbours. During the day, yhe whole small lane will be in silence mode. If you are a morning person and sensitive sleeper then it will be a difficult for you. Please consider before booking. Thank you!

listing_name: Holly's Hidden Charm*2Beds*Old Quarter
description:
Located on the 3rd floor (no lift) of an ANCIENT house in an extremely prime location, right in the heart of the Old Quarter, the apartment is an ideal place for wandering souls to explore Hanoi in the most local way. You can easily find beer, and bars and feel the heartbeats of Hanoi. Everything that you need for a wonderful staycation is just right there. Enjoy!

The space
Apartment is located in a HUNDRED YEAR old building, the entrance is small, old and tight. so do not expect anything modern or fancy. And PLEASE DO NOT BLAME IT ON US. We can do nothing to improve/change that, sadly :(
BUT…
But when you get inside the Holly's Hidden Charm apt, you will got a renovated 50 square meter apartment with modern decoration. You will experience an unique space with:
o 2 cozy and separated queen size beds
o A convenience kitchen where you can cook daily
o A reading conner where you can enjoy your books all day long
o A artistic common space where you can talk or just simply enjoy watching TV
o A private comfortable bathroom inside the apartment
In summary , it is a harmonization of old and new, of modern and tradition.

Guest access
Located at number 45 Hang Buom street, you will see a small alley.
The entry and the staircase might be a little dark and dodgy BUT do no panic.
this is very safe area, you can totally carefree about that.

Other things to note
FEEDBACK: We always value your stay in my place. If there is matter, please feel free to let us know. We are all ears so we believe that we can sort out the solution. Please DO NOT just be quite and leave me a bad feedback, thank you!!!

WEEKEND CHECK IN: Our street become walking street on Friday, Saturday and Sunday nights. If you are checking in after 6pm on weekends, please drop off your taxi on Chả Cá street, then just keep walking up about 300m till you see the number 45 HÀNG BUỒM on the right side. Voila!

AIRPORT PICKUP: I provide PRIVATE airport transfer service with the fee of 18 USD for a 4 seat car and 20 USD for a 7 seat car. Payment will be collected via Airbnb so that you don't have to exchange money at the airport.

TOUR SERVICES: As I'm working for a travel agent, I could you offer very reasonable tours to many famous places in Viet Nam such as:

ANCIENT HOUSE: The building was built since French Colony time so it has a very old cover but once you get inside the apartment, you will satisfy with all the modern equipment.

STAIRS: Located on the 3rd floor, we don't have lift so you have to climb some stairs to reach the place. Please fully aware about this point if you're travelling with big suitcase.

SECOND FLOOR: We have one bed in the second floor, but it will like 1.65m height so be well noted.

NOISE: As located in center of the center, noise might be included in the package. Please fully aware if you are a light sleeper/picky guests. Repeat, repeat: This will not an ideal place for light sleeper/ old people/ picky people due to the noise.

WATER PUMP: You are in Hanoi, a city of more than 1000 year. You are staying in a house with more than 100 year old. So the water system is not modern like you expected. We need a water pump to press the water out. There will be a clinking noise anytime water is used. This is unavoidable, for sure. Please do not hate it, my poor pump :(

EXTRA CHARGE: We charge 5 USD for each extra guest after 2. This amount is automatically added in Airbnb. So, please put the exact number of guest while you process your booking.

EARLY CHECK IN, LATE CHECK OUT: Early check in before 8:00 AM and late check out after 8:00 PM will be fully charged.
Early check in after 8:00 AM and late check out before 8:00 PM will be 50% charged.

For any other demand, don't be hesitate to ask, I am always available for help.

The space
1☘️Picturesque Hanoi Homestay is built by my husband. It is a 7-floor building in center of Hanoi Old Quarter where you can explore all the attractions in the city during day and night:
+ First floor: There is a Vietnamese -style common area & can be used to store luggage (free of charge). You also can bring food back to eat. The housekeeper also lives on the 1st floor.

2🍀 You can check in late at night, please keep quiet and close the door slightly so as not to disturb others. We give you the key card directly.

+ Shampoo, hair conditioner, shower gel, hand washing, comb, toothbrush ..

4🍀It takes 45 minutes from airport to my homestay by car. There are 3 ways to get to my homestay from the airport:
+ Private car ( I can help you)
+ You can book grab car yourself
+ Bus 86 (from 7h00 am to 10h00 pm), the price is 45.000 VND/pax. If you want to go by Bus 86, here is the instruction:
The bus stop for bus 86 is right outside the airport; in case you can’t find it, just ask any officer at the airport and they will show you. When you sit on the bus 86, please give my homestay address to the ticket seller. He will let you get off at the intersection near my homestay, ít is 162 Tran Quang Khai street. You just need to walk to my house for about 4 minutes.

4🍀 Designated smoking areas are the balcony, rooftop or yard outside the first floor.

5🍀Due to the ideal location of being in the center, the area may still be vibrant at night. To block the noise from the street, please close both doors on the balcony: one glass door and one metal door.

6☘️ In the morning or afternoon you will never have any problem finding a great place to grab the BREAKFAST, LUNCH or DINNER within walking distance:
- Bakery shop in 22 Hang Thung street (3mins),
- Long Hoi bread shop in 1 Hang Dau street (4 mins)
- Pho Nga (chicken noodle), @17 Nguyen Huu Huan

- You also should enjoy Ta Hien Beer street (5-10 min walk), a famous beer & food street
- Cha ca Thang Long: famous food in Ha noi (Grilled fish) @6B Duong Thanh street.
- Many shop & restaurants nearby

7🍀 A small kitchen set on the balcony. You can enjoy food and watch the Hanoi Old Quater street from balcony.

8☘️ A beautiful rooftop with an area of 60m2, enough for 15 people to eat and chat or drink beer

9🍀 The homestay located on the street for easy access by car

10🍀 Some local places you can visit by walking:
- You can walk all night in Hanoi Old Quarter (36 old streets) very safely. Especially from friday evening to sunday, you can freely walk around Hoan Kiem lake ( Ngoc Son temple & The Huc bridge) because vehicles are banned in that area and enjoy the culture and atmosphere
- You also should enjoy Ta Hien Beer street, it is very close my house, only 3 minutes for walking

- Ha Giang 3 days or 4 days (zigzag mountain): adventure travel
- Mai Chau 3 days (hill): relax

listing_name: Tran’s Home | Panorama • Extraordinary View • Lift
description:
Serenity, nostalgia and cleanliness are the first things that you can recognize immediately when you come to our place. Located in the old quarter, The house is designed with minimalism architecture which would bring a sense of comfort and convenience to anyone staying here. The house is in one of the oldest lanes in Hanoi and has been an indispensable part of my family for over 60 years. You can have a panoramic view to many French colonial architectural buildings and Vietnamese housing style.

The space
1. LOCATION AND SPACE:
(Note: Potential for noise from Bars nearby at midnight - for Light sleeper please consider carefully)

Trần Home is an ideal, private place in the middle of the city that keeps you away from all of the workaday worries. The Penthouse is on the 5th floor (top of the building) and has been newly renovated yet in the building was built a long time ago. The neighborhood brings you an old Hanoi trace, nostalgic atmosphere with a view to a French colonial architectural building.
Additionally, because the house is on a pedestrian food street, you can access easily to a series of restaurants, convenient stores, bars and clubs.
You will like the minimalist design of the room with mainly black and white, bringing along a sense of cleanliness. We have all the things that you may require: queen size bed, extra bed, hygienic bathroom, strong Wifi electronic devices like AC, mini-fridge, smart TV (With Netflix streaming service),... The house has a wide and lovely rooftop. This is where you can enjoy sunlight with a cup of coffee in the daytime or cool breeze with a bottle of beer when the night falls.
2. LIVE LIKE LOCALS:
Staying with us you will learn how to live like a real Vietnamese. Surrounded by friendly neighbors, with a lot of sidewalk eateries just outside the lane, you will be taken care from head to toe, from a perfect sleeping time to a pleasant experience.
3. EASY ACCESS TO ANY PLACES:
We are on the most famous and traditional Vietnamese street food of Hanoi!
In addition, every weekend nights, our street will transform into Walking food/entertainment street.
* 10 steps to Bach Ma temple - Vietnamese traditional live music on the street perform by Children.
* 1 mins to Bia Hoi street - Modern live Music on the street
* 1 mins to Ma May street - \ Chau Van\"- a traditional folk art of northern Vietnam
* 3 mins to the Night market
